variants.nodeMetadataSpec:
capitalized: Anomaly Detection
short: ML_AD
tagColor: 'blue'
plural: ML Anomaly Detections

config:
 
- groupName: Anomaly Model Input
  items:

    - type: textBox
      displayName: 'Model Instance Name'
      attributeName: 'mname'
      isRequired: true

    - type: toggleButton
      displayName: 'Create Model'
      attributeName: 'Forcecreate'
      default: true

    - type: toggleButton
      displayName: 'Multi-Series'
      attributeName: 'multiseries'
      isRequired: false
      default: false

    - type: columnDropdownSelector
      displayName: 'Series Column'
      attributeName: 'seriescol'
      isRequired: false
      enableIf: "{{ config.multiseries }}"

# Name of the column containing the timestamps in input data #

    - type: columnDropdownSelector
      displayName: 'Timestamp Column'
      attributeName: 'tscol'
      isRequired: true

# Name of the column containing the target (dependent value) in input data #

    - type: columnDropdownSelector
      displayName: 'Target Column'
      attributeName: 'tgtcol'
      isRequired: true



    - type: toggleButton
      displayName: 'Config Object'
      attributeName: 'cobject'
      isRequired: false
      default: false

    - type: textBox
      displayName: 'Prediction Interval'
      attributeName: 'predictioninterval'
      enableIf: '{%- if config.cobject %}true{%- else %}false{%- endif %}'
      default: 'ex:0.80(float value)'

# Training an Anomaly Detection Model with Labeled Data #

    - type: toggleButton
      displayName: 'Supervised Data'
      attributeName: 'spdata'
      default: false
      enableIf: '{%-if config.uspdata %}false{%- else %}true{%- endif %}'

    - type: columnDropdownSelector
      displayName: 'Labeled Column'
      attributeName: 'lcdata'
      default: false
      enableIf: '{%-if config.spdata %}true{%- else %}false{%- endif %}'

# Detecting Anomalies for a Single Time Series (Unsupervised) #

    - type: toggleButton
      displayName: 'Unsupervised Data'
      attributeName: 'uspdata'
      isRequired: false
      default: false
      enableIf: '{%-if config.spdata %}false{%- else %}true{%- endif %}'

    - displayName: Data that needs to be analyzed can be added by enabling the multi-source toggle below 
      type: label
      enableIf: '{%- if config.spdata or config.uspdata %}true{%- else %}false{%- endif %}'

    - type: multisourceToggle
      attributeName: 'mtoggle'
      default: false
      enableIf: '{%- if config.spdata or config.uspdata %}true{%- else %}false{%- endif %}'

systemColumns:
- displayName: "FORECAST"
  attributeName: forecast
  transform: ""
  dataType: FLOAT
  placement: end
  description: 'Generated by ML Anomaly Detection Model'

- displayName: "LOWER_BOUND"
  attributeName: lower_bound
  transform: ""
  dataType: FLOAT
  placement: end
  description: 'Generated by ML Anomaly Detection Model'

- displayName: "UPPER_BOUND"
  attributeName: upper_bound
  transform: ""
  dataType: FLOAT
  placement: end
  description: 'Generated by ML Anomaly Detection Model'

- displayName: "IS_ANOMALY"
  attributeName: anomaly
  transform: ""
  dataType: BOOLEAN
  placement: end
  description: 'Generated by ML Anomaly Detection Model'

- displayName: "PERCENTILE"
  attributeName: percentile
  transform: ""
  dataType: FLOAT
  placement: end
  description: 'Generated by ML Anomaly Detection Model'

- displayName: "DISTANCE"
  attributeName: distance
  transform: ""
  dataType: FLOAT
  placement: end
  description: 'Generated by ML Anomaly Detection Model'

items.enableIf: {{ config.multiseries }}
{%- if config.cobject %}true{%- else %}false{%- endif %}
{%-if config.uspdata %}false{%- else %}true{%- endif %}
{%-if config.spdata %}true{%- else %}false{%- endif %}
{%-if config.spdata %}false{%- else %}true{%- endif %}

items.displayName: Data that needs to be analyzed can be added by enabling the multi-source toggle below
items.enableIf: {%- if config.spdata or config.uspdata %}true{%- else %}false{%- endif %}
{%- if config.spdata or config.uspdata %}true{%- else %}false{%- endif %}

systemColumns.description: Generated by ML Anomaly Detection Model

variants.nodeMetadataSpec:
capitalized: API Call
short: API
plural: Excel Files
tagColor: 'orange'

deployStrategy: advanced

config:

- groupName: Options
  items:
 
  - displayName: Snowflake EXTERNAL ACCESS INTEGRATION Name
    attributeName: extIntegration
    type: textBox
    default: "COALESCE_API_INTEGRATION"
    isRequired: true
    
  - displayName: Snowlake secret for Coalesce API token 
    attributeName: api
    type: textBox
    default: "COALESCE_API_TOKEN"
    isRequired: true

  - type: tabular
    displayName: 'Workspace-Node details'
    attributeName: nodeconfig
    columns:

    - type: textBox
      displayName: Workspace ID
      attributeName: wksID
      isRequired: true
    
    -  type: textBox
       displayName: Node name
       attributeName: nodename
       isRequired: true

    - type: textBox
      displayName: Storage Location (E.g DBName.SchemaName)
      attributeName: storageLocation
      isRequired: true
 
    isRequired: true

items.displayName: Snowlake secret for Coalesce API token

variants.nodeMetadataSpec:
capitalized: API Call
short: API
plural: Excel Files
tagColor: 'orange'

deployStrategy: advanced

config:

- groupName: Options
  items:
 
  - displayName: Snowflake EXTERNAL ACCESS INTEGRATION Name
    attributeName: extIntegration
    type: textBox
    default: "COALESCE_API_INTEGRATION"

  - displayName: Bearer token/Token/API-key Authorization
    type: toggleButton
    attributeName: bauth
    enableIf: "{%if config.cauth %} false {%else%} true {%endif%}"
    default: false

  - displayName: ClientID/Secret Authorization
    type: toggleButton
    attributeName: cauth
    enableIf: "{%if config.bauth %} false {%else%} true {%endif%}"
    default: false

  - displayName: Snowlake secret for API token 
    attributeName: api_token
    type: textBox
    default: "COALESCE_API_TOKEN"
    enableIf: "{%if config.bauth == true %} true {%else%} false  {%endif%}"

  - displayName: HTTP headers(Ex:Authorization,x-api-key')
    attributeName: headertype
    type: textBox
    default: ""
    enableIf: "{%if config.bauth == true or config.cauth == true%} true {%else%} false  {%endif%}"   

  - displayName: Snowlake secret for API Client ID 
    attributeName: api_id
    type: textBox
    default: "COALESCE_API_TOKEN"
    enableIf: "{%if config.cauth == true %} true {%else%} false  {%endif%}"

  - displayName: Snowlake secret for API Client password
    attributeName: sapi_token
    type: textBox
    default: "COALESCE_API_TOKEN"
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{%if config.cauth == true %} true {%else%} false  {%endif%}"
  
  - displayName: Method
    attributeName: method
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: "get"
    options:
    - "get"
    - "post"
    - "put"
    isRequired: true

  - displayName: URI
    attributeName: uri
    type: textBox
    placeholder: Ex:'https://app.coalescesoftware.io/api/v1/runs'
    isRequired: true
  
  - displayName: Forcibly add security credentials in header
    type: toggleButton
    attributeName: forceauth
    default: false
    enableif: "{%if config.bauth == false and config.cauth == false %}"
  
  - type: label
    displayName: ⚠️ It is a security threat to add tokens/credentials in headers.If you want to proceed aware of the risk enable 'Forcibly add security credentials in header' toggle
    attributeName: warlabel
    enableIf:  "{%if ('Authorization' in config.headers or 'x-api-key' in config.headers) and ((config.forceauth == false or config.forceauth is undefined))%} true {%else%} false {%endif%}"
 
  - displayName: Headers
    attributeName: headers
    type: textBox
    default: ''
    isRequired: false
  
  - displayName: Payload
    attributeName: payload
    type: textBox
    default: ''
    isRequired: false

systemColumns:

- displayName: 'URI'
  attributeName: uri
  transform: ''
  dataType: STRING
  placement: beginning


- displayName: 'RESPONSE'
  attributeName: value
  transform: ''
  dataType: VARIANT
  placement: end

items.enableIf: {%if config.cauth %} false {%else%} true {%endif%}
{%if config.bauth %} false {%else%} true {%endif%}
{%if config.bauth == true %} true {%else%} false  {%endif%}
{%if config.bauth == true or config.cauth == true%} true {%else%} false  {%endif%}

items.displayName: Snowlake secret for API Client ID
items.enableIf: {%if config.cauth == true %} true {%else%} false  {%endif%}

items.displayName: Snowlake secret for API Client password
items.enableIf: {%if config.cauth == true %} true {%else%} false  {%endif%}

items.displayName: Forcibly add security credentials in header
⚠️ It is a security threat to add tokens/credentials in headers.If you want to proceed aware of the risk enable 'Forcibly add security credentials in header' toggle
items.enableIf: {%if ('Authorization' in config.headers or 'x-api-key' in config.headers) and ((config.forceauth == false or config.forceauth is undefined))%} true {%else%} false {%endif%}

variants.nodeMetadataSpec:
capitalized: BigLake External Table
short: 'ext_bl'
tagColor: '#C4B3D3'
isDisabled: false
plural: BigLake Tables

deployStrategy: advanced
isColumnResyncEnabled: true

config:
- groupName: Data Source Options
  items:

  - displayName: Source Type
    attributeName: sourceType
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: Cloud Storage
    options:
    - Cloud Storage
    - Amazon S3
    - Azure Blob Storage

  - displayName: File Format
    attributeName: fileFormatCS
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: NEWLINE_DELIMITED_JSON
    options:
    - CSV
    - NEWLINE_DELIMITED_JSON
    - AVRO
    - ORC
    - PARQUET
    - DELTA_LAKE
    - ICEBERG
    enableIf: "{% if config.sourceType == 'Cloud Storage' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Format
    attributeName: fileFormatS3
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: NEWLINE_DELIMITED_JSON
    options:
    - CSV
    - NEWLINE_DELIMITED_JSON
    - AVRO
    - ORC
    - PARQUET
    - DELTA_LAKE
    - ICEBERG
    enableIf: "{% if config.sourceType == 'Amazon S3' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Format
    attributeName: fileFormatAS
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: NEWLINE_DELIMITED_JSON
    options:
    - CSV
    - NEWLINE_DELIMITED_JSON
    - AVRO
    - ORC
    - PARQUET
    - DELTA_LAKE
    enableIf: "{% if config.sourceType == 'Azure Blob Storage' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Cloud Resource Connection ID
    attributeName: connection
    type: textBox
    default: DEFAULT
    isRequired: false

  - type: label
    displayName: URI with wildcard support (💡Ex. gs://bucket/path/*.parquet)
    attributeName: labelCSInfo
    enableIf: "{% if (config.sourceType == 'Cloud Storage' and config.fileFormatCS not in ['DELTA_LAKE', 'ICEBERG']) or (config.sourceType == 'Amazon S3' and config.fileFormatS3 not in ['DELTA_LAKE', 'ICEBERG']) or (config.sourceType == 'Azure Blob Storage' and config.fileFormatAS not in ['DELTA_LAKE']) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: tabular
    displayName: ''
    attributeName: multiUriConfig
    columns:

    -  displayName: ''
       attributeName: multiUris
       type: textBox
       isRequired: false
  
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if (config.sourceType == 'Cloud Storage' and config.fileFormatCS not in ['DELTA_LAKE', 'ICEBERG']) or (config.sourceType == 'Amazon S3' and config.fileFormatS3 not in ['DELTA_LAKE', 'ICEBERG']) or (config.sourceType == 'Azure Blob Storage' and config.fileFormatAS not in ['DELTA_LAKE']) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: label
    displayName: Delta Lake Parent Directory (💡Ex. gs://bucket/path/delta_table)
    attributeName: labelDLInfo
    enableIf: "{% if (config.sourceType == 'Cloud Storage' and config.fileFormatCS in ['DELTA_LAKE']) or (config.sourceType == 'Amazon S3' and config.fileFormatS3 in ['DELTA_LAKE']) or (config.sourceType == 'Azure Blob Storage' and config.fileFormatAS in ['DELTA_LAKE']) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: label
    displayName: Iceberg Metadata File Location (💡Ex. gs://bucket/path/metadata/xxx.json)
    attributeName: labelIBInfo
    enableIf: "{% if (config.sourceType == 'Cloud Storage' and config.fileFormatCS in ['ICEBERG']) or (config.sourceType == 'Amazon S3' and config.fileFormatS3 in ['ICEBERG']) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: ''
    attributeName: singleUri
    type: textBox
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if (config.sourceType == 'Cloud Storage' and config.fileFormatCS in ['DELTA_LAKE', 'ICEBERG']) or (config.sourceType == 'Amazon S3' and config.fileFormatS3 in ['DELTA_LAKE', 'ICEBERG']) or (config.sourceType == 'Azure Blob Storage' and config.fileFormatAS in ['DELTA_LAKE']) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Enable Hive Partitioning
    attributeName: hivePartition
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if (config.sourceType == 'Cloud Storage' and config.fileFormatCS not in ['DELTA_LAKE', 'ICEBERG']) or (config.sourceType == 'Amazon S3' and config.fileFormatS3 not in ['DELTA_LAKE', 'ICEBERG']) or (config.sourceType == 'Azure Blob Storage' and config.fileFormatAS not in ['DELTA_LAKE']) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

- groupName: Hive Partitioning Options
  items:

  - displayName: Partition URI Prefix (💡Ex. gs://bucket/path)
    attributeName: partURIPrefix
    type: textBox

  - displayName: Auto Infer Types
    attributeName: autoTypes
    type: toggleButton
    default: true

  - type: tabular
    displayName: Partition Columns
    attributeName: partColumnsConfig
    columns:

    -  displayName: Column Name(💡Ex. region)
       attributeName: partColumnList
       type: textBox

    -  displayName: Column DataType
       attributeName: partColumnDataTypeList
       type: dropdownSelector
       default: INT64
       options:
        - INT64
        - STRING
        - INTEGER
        - DATE
        - TIMESTAMP
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.autoTypes == false %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  enableIf: "{% if config.hivePartition and (config.sourceType == 'Cloud Storage' and config.fileFormatCS not in ['DELTA_LAKE', 'ICEBERG']) or (config.sourceType == 'Amazon S3' and config.fileFormatS3 not in ['DELTA_LAKE', 'ICEBERG']) or (config.sourceType == 'Azure Blob Storage' and config.fileFormatAS not in ['DELTA_LAKE']) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

- groupName: File Format Options
  items:

  - displayName: Compression (Choose according to file type)
    attributeName: compression
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: ''
    options:
    - ''
    - GZIP
    - DEFLATE
    - SNAPPY
    - ZSTD
    enableIf: "{% if (config.sourceType == 'Cloud Storage' and config.fileFormatCS in ['CSV', 'NEWLINE_DELIMITED_JSON']) or (config.sourceType in ['Amazon S3'] and config.fileFormatS3 in ['CSV', 'NEWLINE_DELIMITED_JSON']) or (config.sourceType in ['Azure Blob Storage'] and config.fileFormatAS in ['CSV', 'NEWLINE_DELIMITED_JSON'])%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Field Delimiter
    attributeName: fieldDelim
    type: textBox
    default: ","
    enableIf: "{% if (config.sourceType == 'Cloud Storage' and config.fileFormatCS in ['CSV']) or (config.sourceType in ['Amazon S3'] and config.fileFormatS3 in ['CSV']) or (config.sourceType in ['Azure Blob Storage'] and config.fileFormatAS in ['CSV'])%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Skip Leading Rows
    attributeName: skipHeader
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if (config.sourceType == 'Cloud Storage' and config.fileFormatCS in ['CSV']) or (config.sourceType in ['Amazon S3'] and config.fileFormatS3 in ['CSV']) or (config.sourceType in ['Azure Blob Storage'] and config.fileFormatAS in ['CSV'])%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    default: "0"

  - displayName: Quote Character
    attributeName: quoteStr
    type: textBox
    default: '"'
    enableIf: "{% if (config.sourceType == 'Cloud Storage' and config.fileFormatCS in ['CSV']) or (config.sourceType in ['Amazon S3'] and config.fileFormatS3 in ['CSV']) or (config.sourceType in ['Azure Blob Storage'] and config.fileFormatAS in ['CSV'])%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Allow Quoted Newlines
    attributeName: quoteNewLine
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if (config.sourceType == 'Cloud Storage' and config.fileFormatCS in ['CSV']) or (config.sourceType in ['Amazon S3'] and config.fileFormatS3 in ['CSV']) or (config.sourceType in ['Azure Blob Storage'] and config.fileFormatAS in ['CSV'])%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Allow Jagged Rows
    attributeName:  misTrailRows
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if (config.sourceType == 'Cloud Storage' and config.fileFormatCS in ['CSV']) or (config.sourceType in ['Amazon S3'] and config.fileFormatS3 in ['CSV']) or (config.sourceType in ['Azure Blob Storage'] and config.fileFormatAS in ['CSV'])%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Encoding
    attributeName: encoding
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: UTF8
    options:
      - ""
      - "BIG5"
      - "UTF8"
      - "EUCJP"
      - "EUCKR"
      - "GB18030"
      - "IBM420"
      - "IBM424"
      - "IBM949"
      - "ISO2022CN"
      - "ISO2022JP"
      - "ISO2022KR"
      - "ISO88591"
      - "ISO88592"
      - "ISO88595"
      - "ISO88596"
      - "ISO88597"
      - "ISO88598"
      - "ISO88599"
      - "ISO885915"
      - "KOI8R"
      - "SHIFTJIS"
      - "UTF16"
      - "UTF16BE"
      - "UTF16LE"
      - "UTF32"
      - "UTF32BE"
      - "UTF32LE"
      - "WINDOWS874"
      - "WINDOWS949"
      - "WINDOWS1250"
      - "WINDOWS1251"
      - "WINDOWS1252"
      - "WINDOWS1253"
      - "WINDOWS1254"
      - "WINDOWS1255"
      - "WINDOWS1256"
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if (config.sourceType == 'Cloud Storage' and config.fileFormatCS in ['CSV']) or (config.sourceType in ['Amazon S3'] and config.fileFormatS3 in ['CSV']) or (config.sourceType in ['Azure Blob Storage'] and config.fileFormatAS in ['CSV'])%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  -  displayName: Max Bad Records
     attributeName: badRecords
     type: textBox
     default: "0"
     enableIf: "{% if (config.sourceType == 'Cloud Storage' and config.fileFormatCS in ['CSV', 'NEWLINE_DELIMITED_JSON']) or (config.sourceType in ['Amazon S3'] and config.fileFormatS3 in ['CSV', 'NEWLINE_DELIMITED_JSON']) or (config.sourceType in ['Azure Blob Storage'] and config.fileFormatAS in ['CSV', 'NEWLINE_DELIMITED_JSON'])%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Null Marker String
    attributeName: nullMarker
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if (config.sourceType == 'Cloud Storage' and config.fileFormatCS in ['CSV']) or (config.sourceType in ['Amazon S3'] and config.fileFormatS3 in ['CSV']) or (config.sourceType in ['Azure Blob Storage'] and config.fileFormatAS in ['CSV'])%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Ignore Unknown Values
    attributeName: ignoreUnknown
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if (config.sourceType == 'Cloud Storage' and config.fileFormatCS in ['CSV', 'NEWLINE_DELIMITED_JSON']) or (config.sourceType in ['Amazon S3'] and config.fileFormatS3 in ['CSV', 'NEWLINE_DELIMITED_JSON']) or (config.sourceType in ['Azure Blob Storage'] and config.fileFormatAS in ['CSV', 'NEWLINE_DELIMITED_JSON'])%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"


  - displayName: JSON Extension
    attributeName: jsonExt
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: ''
    options:
        - ''
        - GEOJSON
    enableIf: "{% if (config.sourceType == 'Cloud Storage' and config.fileFormatCS in ['NEWLINE_DELIMITED_JSON']) or (config.sourceType in ['Amazon S3'] and config.fileFormatS3 in ['NEWLINE_DELIMITED_JSON']) or (config.sourceType in ['Azure Blob Storage'] and config.fileFormatAS in ['NEWLINE_DELIMITED_JSON'])%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Reference File Schema URI
    attributeName: refSchemaURI
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if (config.sourceType == 'Cloud Storage' and config.fileFormatCS in ['PARQUET', 'ORC', 'AVRO']) or (config.sourceType in ['Azure Blob Storage'] and config.fileFormatAS in ['PARQUET', 'ORC', 'AVRO']) or (config.sourceType in ['Amazon S3'] and config.fileFormatS3 in ['PARQUET', 'ORC', 'AVRO']) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: tabular
    displayName: Decimal Target Types
    attributeName: decTargetConfig
    columns:

      - displayName: Decimal Conversion Order
        attributeName: decConvOrder
        type: dropdownSelector
        default: ''
        options:
            - ''
            - NUMERIC
            - BIGNUMERIC
            - STRING

    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if (config.sourceType == 'Cloud Storage' and config.fileFormatCS in ['PARQUET', 'ORC', 'AVRO']) or (config.sourceType in ['Azure Blob Storage'] and config.fileFormatAS in ['PARQUET', 'ORC', 'AVRO']) or (config.sourceType in ['Amazon S3'] and config.fileFormatS3 in ['PARQUET', 'ORC', 'AVRO']) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  enableIf: "{% if (config.sourceType == 'Cloud Storage' and config.fileFormatCS in ['DELTA_LAKE', 'ICEBERG']) or (config.sourceType == 'Amazon S3' and config.fileFormatS3 in ['DELTA_LAKE', 'ICEBERG']) or (config.sourceType == 'Azure Blob Storage' and config.fileFormatAS in ['DELTA_LAKE']) %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"

- groupName: Metadata Caching Options
  items:

  - displayName: Metadata Cache Mode
    attributeName: metaCache
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: AUTOMATIC
    options:
        - ''
        - AUTOMATIC
        - MANUAL

  - type: label
    displayName: ⚠️ Warning! maxStaleness must be specified when MetadataCacheMode is AUTOMATIC
    attributeName: labelStaleWarning
    enableIf: "{% if config.metaCache == 'AUTOMATIC' and config.maxStale | trim | length == 0 %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Max Staleness(💡Ex. 4 HOUR)
    attributeName: maxStale
    type: textBox

  isRequired: false
  enableIf: "{% if (config.sourceType == 'Cloud Storage' and config.fileFormatCS not in ['DELTA_LAKE', 'ICEBERG']) or (config.sourceType == 'Amazon S3' and config.fileFormatS3 not in ['DELTA_LAKE', 'ICEBERG']) or (config.sourceType == 'Azure Blob Storage' and config.fileFormatAS not in ['DELTA_LAKE']) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

- groupName: Create Options
  items:

  - type: materializationSelector
    isRequired: true
    default: external table
    options:
    - external table
    enableIf: "true"

  - type: label
    displayName: 🚨 After creation, Re-sync Columns to align with the inferred structure.
    attributeName: labelResyncInfo
    enableIf: "{% if config.autodetect or (config.autodetect == false and config.hivePartition and config.autoTypes == false) or ((config.sourceType == 'Cloud Storage' and config.fileFormatCS in ['DELTA_LAKE', 'ICEBERG']) or (config.sourceType == 'Amazon S3' and config.fileFormatS3 in ['DELTA_LAKE', 'ICEBERG']) or (config.sourceType == 'Azure Blob Storage' and config.fileFormatAS in ['DELTA_LAKE'])) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: label
    displayName: ⚠️ Warning! Hive partition columns are UI-derived from folder paths. Defining them again in the mapping may cause duplicate column errors.
    attributeName: labelFilterWarning
    enableIf: "{% if config.autodetect == false and config.hivePartition and config.autoTypes == false and (config.sourceType == 'Cloud Storage' and config.fileFormatCS not in ['DELTA_LAKE', 'ICEBERG']) or (config.sourceType == 'Amazon S3' and config.fileFormatS3 not in ['DELTA_LAKE', 'ICEBERG']) or (config.sourceType == 'Azure Blob Storage' and config.fileFormatAS not in ['DELTA_LAKE']) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Auto Detect Schema
    attributeName: autodetect
    type: toggleButton
    default: true
    enableIf: "{% if (config.sourceType == 'Cloud Storage' and config.fileFormatCS not in ['DELTA_LAKE', 'ICEBERG']) or (config.sourceType == 'Amazon S3' and config.fileFormatS3 not in ['DELTA_LAKE', 'ICEBERG']) or (config.sourceType == 'Azure Blob Storage' and config.fileFormatAS not in ['DELTA_LAKE']) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: tabExpirationToggle
    displayName: Table Expiration
    default: false
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Expiration Type*
    attributeName: exprnType
    default: "DAYS FROM NOW"
    type: dropdownSelector
    options:
    - "EXACT DATE/DATETIME"
    - "DAYS FROM NOW"
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.tabExpirationToggle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: label
    displayName: 'Expiration Value* (💡Ex. 2030-12-31 | 2030-12-31 23:59:59)'
    attributeName: labelTimeExprn
    enableIf: "{% if config.tabExpirationToggle and config.exprnType == 'EXACT DATE/DATETIME' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: label
    displayName: 'Expiration Value* (💡Ex. 30)'
    attributeName: labelDayExprn
    enableIf: "{% if config.tabExpirationToggle and config.exprnType == 'DAYS FROM NOW' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: textBox
    displayName: ''
    attributeName: tabExprnExpression
    default: ""
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.tabExpirationToggle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

variants.nodeMetadataSpec:
capitalized: Classification
short: CL_
tagColor: '#A3116D'
plural: Classifications

config:
 
- groupName: Classification Model Input
  items:

    - type: textBox
      displayName: 'Model Instance Name'
      attributeName: 'mname'
      isRequired: true

    - type: toggleButton
      displayName: 'Create Model'
      attributeName: 'Forcecreate'
      default: true

# Name of the column containing the label (target value) for each row in the training data. The target column may be BOOLEAN, NUMERIC, or STRING. #

    - type: columnDropdownSelector
      displayName: 'Target Column(BOOLEAN,NUMERIC or STRING)'
      attributeName: 'tgtcol'
      isRequired: true

    - displayName: Data that needs to be analyzed can be added by enabling the multi-source toggle below 
      type: label

    - type: multisourceToggle
      attributeName: 'mtoggle'
      default: true
      
systemColumns:

- displayName: PREDICTION_CLASS
  attributeName: class
  transform: ""
  dataType: STRING
  placement: end
  description: 'Generated by ML Classification Model'

- displayName: "PREDICTION"
  attributeName: predict
  transform: ""
  dataType: OBJECT
  placement: end
  description: 'Generated by ML Classification Model'

items.displayName: Data that needs to be analyzed can be added by enabling the multi-source toggle below

definitionSummary.capitalized: COPY INTO WITH FULL LOAD OPTION

variants.nodeMetadataSpec:
capitalized: COPY INTO WITH FULL LOAD OPTION
short: 'COPY'
tagColor: '#6ca37b'
isDisabled: false
plural: Copy Into

deployStrategy: advanced
isColumnResyncEnabled: true

config:
- groupName: General Options
  items:
 
  - type: materializationSelector
    default: table
    options:
    - table
    - transient table
    isRequired: true 
  
  - displayName: Truncate Before
    attributeName: truncateBefore
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    enableIf: "{%if config.inferschema %} false {%else%} true {%endif%}"

  - displayName: InferSchema
    attributeName: inferschema
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
  
  - displayName: DDL Case Insensitive
    attributeName: ddlCaseInsensitive
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    enableIf: "{%if config.inferschema %} false {%else%} true {%endif%}"

- groupName: Source Data
  items:
  
  - type: label
    attributeName: note2
    displayName: 
                   "NOTE:
                   \n
                   Ensure the parameter loadType is added in Workspace and 
                   deployment environment if you intend to reload data from source files
                   Refer documentation for more info"
    enableIf: "{%- if parameters == {} -%} true {%- else -%} false {%- endif -%}"

  - displayName: Internal or External Stage
    attributeName: intextstage
    type: toggleButton
    isRequired: false 
    enableIf: "{% if config.extlocation or config.inferschema %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"    	
	
  - displayName: External location
    attributeName: extlocation
    type: toggleButton
    isRequired: false  
    enableIf: "{% if config.intextstage or config.inferschema %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"
	  
  - displayName: Coalesce Storage Location of Stage
    attributeName: stageStorageLocationName
    type: textBox
    default: 'Enter Storage Location name'
    enableIf: "{% if config.intextstage or config.inferschema %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    isRequired: true

  - displayName: Stage Name
    attributeName: stageName
    type: textBox
    default: 'Enter stage name-stage_name'
    enableIf: "{% if config.intextstage or config.inferschema%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    isRequired: true

  - displayName: Path or subfolder 
    attributeName: subfolder
    type: textBox
    default: 'Enter folder name in stage if applicable-folder/subfolder'
    enableIf: "{% if config.intextstage or config.inferschema%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: File Name(s) (Ex:a.csv,b.csv )
    attributeName: fileNames
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if config.intextstage or config.inferschema %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: File Pattern (Ex:.*hea.*[.]csv)
    attributeName: filePattern
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if config.intextstage and config.inferschema == false%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: External URI
    attributeName: externalURI
    type: textBox
    default: 'Enter external URI-Ex:s3://snowflake-docs'
    enableIf: "{% if config.extlocation and config.inferschema == false %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Storage Integration (Mandatory for Private External URIs)
    attributeName: storageintegration
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if config.extlocation and config.inferschema == false %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    isRequired: false

- groupName: File Format Options
  items:
  - displayName: File Format Definition
    attributeName: fileFormatType
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: "File Format Name"
    options:
    - File Format Name
    - File Format Values
    

  - displayName: Coalesce Storage Location of File Format 
    attributeName: fileFormatLoc
    type: textBox
    default: ""
    enableIf: "{% if config.fileFormatType == 'File Format Name'%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"  

  - displayName: File Format Name
    attributeName: fileFormatName
    type: textBox
    default: ""
    enableIf: "{% if config.fileFormatType == 'File Format Name' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
   
  - displayName: Parse header
    attributeName: parsehdr1
    enableIf: "{% if  config.inferschema == true and config.fileType in ('CSV') and config.fileFormatType == 'File Format Name'   %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    type: toggleButton
    default: true
    isRequired: false  

  - displayName: File Type
    attributeName: fileType
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: CSV
    options:
    - "CSV"
    - "PARQUET"
    - "JSON"
    - "AVRO"
    - "ORC"
    - "XML"
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Compression
    attributeName: compression
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType not in ('ORC')) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    type: dropdownSelector
    options:
    - "AUTO"
    - "GZIP"
    - "BZ2"
    - "BROTLI"
    - "ZSTD"
    - "DEFLATE"
    - "RAW_DEFLATE"
    - "NONE"
    - ""
    isRequired: false
    

  - displayName: Record delimiter
    attributeName: recDelim
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV')) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    default: "\n"
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Field delimiter
    attributeName: fieldDelim
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV'))%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    default: ","
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Field optionally enclosed by
    attributeName: fieldEnclosed
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV')) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    default: "\\042"
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Number of header lines to skip
    attributeName: skipHeader
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV') and config.inferschema == false %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    default: "1"
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Parse header
    attributeName: parsehdr
    enableIf: "{% if  config.inferschema == true and config.fileType in ('CSV') and config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name'   %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    type: toggleButton
    default: true
    isRequired: false  
  

  - displayName: Encoding
    attributeName: encoding
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: "UTF8"
    options:
    - "BIG5"
    - "UTF8"
    - "EUCJP"
    - "EUCKR"
    - "GB18030"
    - "IBM420"
    - "IBM424"
    - "IBM949"
    - "ISO2022CN"
    - "ISO2022JP"
    - "ISO2022KR"
    - "ISO88591"
    - "ISO88592"
    - "ISO88595"
    - "ISO88596"
    - "ISO88597"
    - "ISO88598"
    - "ISO88599"
    - "ISO885915"
    - "KOI8R"
    - "SHIFTJIS"
    - "UTF16"
    - "UTF16BE"
    - "UTF16LE"
    - "UTF32"
    - "UTF32BE"
    - "UTF32LE"
    - "WINDOWS874"
    - "WINDOWS949"
    - "WINDOWS1250"
    - "WINDOWS1251"
    - "WINDOWS1252"
    - "WINDOWS1253"
    - "WINDOWS1254"
    - "WINDOWS1255"
    - "WINDOWS1256"
    - ""
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV')) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
  
  - displayName: Strip Outer Array
    attributeName: stripouterarray
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('JSON') )  %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    type: toggleButton
    default: true
    isRequired: false   

  - displayName: Date format
    attributeName: dateformat
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('JSON','CSV') and config.inferschema == false)   %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Time format
    attributeName: timeformat
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('JSON','CSV') ) and config.inferschema == false%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Timestamp format
    attributeName: timestampformat
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('JSON','CSV'))  and config.inferschema == false%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    isRequired: false
  
  - displayName: Trim space
    attributeName: trimSpace
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType not in ('XML'))%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    type: toggleButton
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Replace invalid characters
    attributeName: replaceinvalidcharacters
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name')%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    type: toggleButton
    default: true
    isRequired: false    
  
  - displayName: Using vectorised scanner
    attributeName: usevectscan
    type: toggleButton
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('PARQUET') )   %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    isRequired: false

- groupName: Extended CSV File Format Options
  enableIf: "{% if config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV')%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
  items:

  - displayName: Skip blank lines
    attributeName: skipBlankLines
    enableIf: "{% if config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV') and config.inferschema == false %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    type: toggleButton
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Nulls for empty field
    attributeName: emptyfield
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV'))%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    type: toggleButton
    default: true
    isRequired: false    

  - displayName: Skip byte order mark
    attributeName: bytemark
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV'))%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    type: toggleButton
    default: true
    isRequired: false 
  
  - displayName: Parsing error for column mismatch
    attributeName: columnmismatch
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV'))%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    isRequired: false 
   
  - displayName: Multiple lines
    attributeName: mulline
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV') )  %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    type: toggleButton
    default: true
    isRequired: false   
  
  - displayName: Binary format
    attributeName: binformat
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV')) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: "HEX"
    options:
    - "HEX"
    - "BASE64"
    - "UTF8"
    - ""
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Replace values with NULL
    attributeName: nullchar
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV')and config.inferschema == false) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    default: ('\N')
    isRequired: false   

  - displayName: Escape optionally enclosed by
    attributeName: escapeenclosed
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV')) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    default: "\\134"
    isRequired: false   

  - displayName: Escape enclosed/unenclosed values
    attributeName: escapeval
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV')) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    isRequired: false 

- groupName: Copy Options
  enableIf: "{%if config.inferschema %} false {%else%} true {%endif%}"
  items:

  - displayName: On Error Behavior
    attributeName: onError
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: ""
    options:
    - "CONTINUE"
    - "SKIP_FILE"
    - "SKIP_FILE_<num>"
    - "SKIP_FILE_<num>%"
    - "ABORT_STATEMENT"
    - ""
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Specify the number of errors that can be skipped
    attributeName: errornumber
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if config.onError in('SKIP_FILE_<num>','SKIP_FILE_<num>%') or config.onError1 in('SKIP_FILE_<num>','SKIP_FILE_<num>%') %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Size Limit
    attributeName: sizeLimit
    type: textBox
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Purge Behavior
    attributeName: purgeBehavior
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: ""
    options:
    - "TRUE"
    - "FALSE"
    - ""
    isRequired: false
    
  - displayName: Return Failed Only
    attributeName: returnFailedOnly
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: ""
    options:
    - "TRUE"
    - "FALSE"
    - ""
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Enforce Length
    attributeName: enforceLength
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: ""
    options:
    - "TRUE"
    - "FALSE"
    - ""
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Truncate Columns
    attributeName: truncateColumns
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: ""
    options:
    - "TRUE"
    - "FALSE"
    - ""
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Force
    attributeName: forceLoad
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: ""
    options:
    - "TRUE"
    - "FALSE"
    - ""
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if parameters.loadType != 'Reload'  %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Load Uncertain Files
    attributeName: loadUncertainFiles
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: ""
    options:
    - "TRUE"
    - "FALSE"
    - ""
    isRequired: false  
    
systemColumns:

- displayName: SRC
  transform: '$1'
  dataType: VARIANT
  placement: end
  attributeName: sysJSON

- displayName: LOAD_TIMESTAMP
  transform: 'current_timestamp()::timestamp_ntz'

variants.nodeMetadataSpec:
capitalized: Copy Into
short: COPY
tagColor: gray
plural: Copy Intos

deployStrategy: advanced
isColumnResyncEnabled: true

config:
- groupName: General Options
  items:
 
  - type: materializationSelector
    default: table
    options:
    - table
    isRequired: true 
  
  - displayName: Truncate Before
    attributeName: truncateBefore
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
  
  - displayName: Infer Schema 
    attributeName: inferschema
    type: toggleButton
    default: false

- groupName: Source Data
  items:
  
  - displayName: Path (Ex:gs://bucket/base/path )
    attributeName: filepath
    type: textBox
    isRequired: true
  
  - displayName: Subfolder (Enter folder name in external path if applicable-folder/subfolder)
    attributeName: subfolder
    type: textBox
    default: ''
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: File Name (Ex:a.csv)
    attributeName: fileNames
    type: textBox
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: File Pattern (Ex:*hea*.csv)
    attributeName: filePattern
    type: textBox
    isRequired: false

- groupName: File Format Options
  items:

  - displayName: File Type
    attributeName: fileType
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: CSV
    options:
    - "CSV"
    - "PARQUET"
    - "JSON"
    - "AVRO"
    - "ORC"
    - "XML"
    - "EXCEL"
    isRequired: false
  
  - displayName: Number of Header Rows
    attributeName: headerrows 
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileType in ('EXCEL'))%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    default: "1"
    isRequired: false
  
  - displayName: Sheet name (e.g., "'Sheet1'!A1:E100")
    attributeName: dataaddress 
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileType in ('EXCEL'))%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    default: "\"'Sheet1'!A1:E100\""
    isRequired: false
    
  - displayName: Field delimiter
    attributeName: fieldDelim
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileType in ('CSV'))%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    default: ","
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Parse header
    attributeName: parsehdr
    enableIf: "{% if config.fileType in ('CSV') %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    type: toggleButton
    default: true
    isRequired: false   
  
  - displayName: Multi-line
    attributeName: mulline
    enableIf: "{% if config.fileType in ('CSV','JSON') %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    type: toggleButton
    default: true
    isRequired: false   
  
  - displayName: singlevariantcolumn
    attributeName: svcol
    type: textBox
    default: "SRC"
    enableIf: "{% if config.fileType in ('JSON') %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    isRequired: false
  
  - displayName: ignoreCorruptFiles
    attributeName: igcorfiles
    type: toggleButton
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: ignoreMissingFiles
    attributeName: igmisfiles
    type: toggleButton
    isRequired: false
  
  - displayName: dateformat
    attributeName: dtformat
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if config.fileType in ('XML','CSV','JSON') %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    isRequired: false
  
  - displayName: timestampformat
    attributeName: tstmpformat
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if config.fileType in ('XML','CSV','JSON') %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    isRequired: false
  
  - displayName: encoding
    attributeName: encoding
    default: "UTF-8"
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if config.fileType in ('XML','CSV','JSON') %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: rowTag
    attributeName: xmlrwTag
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if config.fileType in ('XML') %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    isRequired: false
  
  - displayName: rootTag
    attributeName: xmlrtTag
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if config.fileType in ('XML') %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    isRequired: false
  
  
- groupName: Copy Options
  items:

  - displayName: force
    attributeName: forceload
    type: toggleButton
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: mergeschema
    attributeName: mergeschema
    type: toggleButton
    isRequired: false

variants.nodeMetadataSpec:
capitalized: Copy Into Iceberg table
short: 'ICT_COPY'
tagColor: '#C2105B'
isDisabled: false
plural: Copy Into

deployStrategy: advanced

config:

- groupName: Iceberg Options
  items:

  - displayName: Type of catalog
    attributeName: tcatalog
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: Snowflake
    options:
      - Snowflake
      - Polaris
    isRequired: true

  - displayName: Snowflake EXTERNAL VOLUME Name
    attributeName: extvolume
    type: textBox
    isRequired: true
    default: "my_ext_vol"

  - displayName: Base location name
    attributeName: basename
    type: textBox
    isRequired: true
    default: "locname"

  - displayName: Catalog integration
    attributeName: catint
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if config.tcatalog == 'Polaris'  %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Truncate Before
    attributeName: truncateBefore
    type: toggleButton
    default: false


  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: clusterKey
    displayName: Cluster Key
    default: false
    
  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: clusterKeyExpressions
    displayName: Allow Expressions in Cluster Key
    default: false
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.clusterKey %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: tabular
    displayName: 'Cluster Key'
    attributeName: clusterKeyConfig
    columns:

    -  type: columnDropdownSelector
       displayName: Column Name
       attributeName: columnName
       isRequired: false
  
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if (config.clusterKey and not config.clusterKeyExpressions) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: tabular
    displayName: 'Cluster Key'
    attributeName: clusterKeyConfigExpressions
    columns:

    -  type: columnDropdownSelector
       displayName: Column Name
       attributeName: columnNameExpressions
       isRequired: false
  
    -  type: textBox
       displayName: Expression (Column name to be enclosed within double quotes)
       attributeName: sqlExpression
       default: "ex. trunc(<column_name>, -5)"
       isRequired: false
  
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if (config.clusterKey and config.clusterKeyExpressions) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

- groupName: Source Data
  items:

  - type: label
    attributeName: note2
    displayName: 
                   "NOTE:
                   \n
                   Ensure the parameter loadType is added in Workspace and 
                   deployment environment if you intend to reload data from source files
                   Refer documentation for more info"
    enableIf: "{%- if parameters == {} -%} true {%- else -%} false {%- endif -%}"


  - displayName: Internal or External Stage
    attributeName: intextstage
    type: toggleButton
    isRequired: false 
    enableIf: "{% if config.extlocation %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"    	
	
  - displayName: External location
    attributeName: extlocation
    type: toggleButton
    isRequired: false  
    enableIf: "{% if config.intextstage %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"
	  
  - displayName: Coalesce Storage Location of stage
    attributeName: stageStorageLocationName
    type: textBox
    default: 'Enter Storage Location name'
    enableIf: "{% if config.intextstage %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    isRequired: true

  - displayName: Stage Name
    attributeName: stageName
    type: textBox
    default: 'Enter stage name-stage_name/folder_name/'
    enableIf: "{% if config.intextstage %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    isRequired: true

  - displayName: File Name(s) (Optional - Ex:'a.csv','b.csv' )
    attributeName: fileNames
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if config.intextstage %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: File Pattern (Optional - Ex:'.*hea.*[.]csv')
    attributeName: filePattern
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if config.intextstage %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: External URI
    attributeName: externalURI
    type: textBox
    default: 'Enter external URI-Ex:s3://snowflake-docs'
    enableIf: "{% if config.extlocation %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Storage Integration (Mandatory for Private External URIs)
    attributeName: storageintegration
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if config.extlocation %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    isRequired: false

- groupName: File Format
  items:
  - displayName: File Format Definition
    attributeName: fileFormatType
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: "File Format Name"
    options:
    - File Format Name
    - File Format Values

  - displayName: File Format Name
    attributeName: fileFormatName
    type: textBox
    default: ""
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.fileFormatType == 'File Format Name' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: File Format Location
    attributeName: fileFormatLoc
    type: textBox
    default: ""
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.fileFormatType == 'File Format Name' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: File Type
    attributeName: fileType
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: CSV
    options:
    - "CSV"
    - "PARQUET"
    - "JSON"
    - "AVRO"
    - "ORC"
    - "XML"
    isRequired: false
    ##enableIf: "{% if config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Compression
    attributeName: compression
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType not in ('ORC')) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: ""
    options:
    - ""
    - "AUTO"
    - "GZIP"
    - "BZ2"
    - "BROTLI"
    - "ZSTD"
    - "DEFLATE"
    - "RAW_DEFLATE"
    - "NONE"
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Record delimiter
    attributeName: recDelim
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV')) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    default: "\n"
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Field delimiter
    attributeName: fieldDelim
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV')) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    default: ","
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Field optionally enclosed by
    attributeName: fieldEnclosed
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV')) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    default: "\\042"
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Number of header lines to skip
    attributeName: skipHeader
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV')) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    default: "1"
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Skip blank lines
    attributeName: skipBlankLines
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV')) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    type: toggleButton
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Trim space
    attributeName: trimSpace
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType not in ('XML')) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    type: toggleButton
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Replace invalid characters
    attributeName: replaceinvalidcharacters
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name') %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    type: toggleButton
    isRequired: false    

  - displayName: Strip Outer Array
    attributeName: stripouterarray
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('JSON')) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    type: toggleButton
    isRequired: false   

    
  - displayName: Date format
    attributeName: dateformat
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('JSON','CSV')) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Time format
    attributeName: timeformat
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('JSON','CSV')) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Timestamp format
    attributeName: timestampformat
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('JSON','CSV')) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    isRequired: false

- groupName: Copy Options
  items:

  - displayName: On Error Behavior
    attributeName: onError
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: ""
    options:
    - ""
    - "CONTINUE"
    - "SKIP_FILE"
    - "SKIP_FILE_<num>"
    - "SKIP_FILE_<num>%"
    - "ABORT_STATEMENT"
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Specify the number of errors that can be skipped
    attributeName: errornumber
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if config.onError in('SKIP_FILE_<num>','SKIP_FILE_<num>%') or config.onError1 in('SKIP_FILE_<num>','SKIP_FILE_<num>%') %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Size Limit
    attributeName: sizeLimit
    type: textBox
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Purge Behavior
    attributeName: purgeBehavior
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: ""
    options:
    - ""
    - "TRUE"
    - "FALSE"
    isRequired: false
    
  - displayName: Return Failed Only
    attributeName: returnFailedOnly
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: ""
    options:
    - ""
    - "TRUE"
    - "FALSE"
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Enforce Length
    attributeName: enforceLength

    default: ""
    options:
    - ""
    - "TRUE"
    - "FALSE"
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Truncate Columns
    attributeName: truncateColumns
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: ""
    options:
    - ""
    - "TRUE"
    - "FALSE"
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Force

    - "TRUE"
    - "FALSE"
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Load Uncertain Files
    attributeName: loadUncertainFiles
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: ""
    options:
    - ""
    - "TRUE"
    - "FALSE"
    isRequired: false

variants.nodeMetadataSpec:
capitalized: Copy of Date Dimension
short: DIM_DATE
plural: Dates
tagColor: 'black'

deployStrategy: advanced

config:
- groupName: Date Options
  items:
  - displayName: Starting Date
    attributeName: startingDate
    type: textBox
    syntax: sql
    default: 'DATEADD(DAY, -730, CURRENT_DATE)'
    isRequired: true

  - displayName: Number of Days to Generate
    attributeName: daysToGenerate
    type: textBox
    default: '2000'
    isRequired: true
    
  - displayName: Generated Date Column Name
    attributeName: dateColumnName
    type: textBox
    default: '`DATE_COL`'
    isRequired: true

- groupName: Additional Options
  items:
  - type: materializationSelector
    default: table
    options:
    - table
    - view
    isRequired: true

  - type: overrideSQLToggle
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType == 'view' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Truncate Before
    attributeName: truncateBefore
    type: toggleButton
    default: true
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: insertZeroKey
    displayName: Insert Zero Key Record
    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType == 'table' or node.materializationType == 'transient table'%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Default String Value
    attributeName: insertZeroKeyStr
    type: textBox
    defaultValue: "UNKNOWN"
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.insertZeroKey == true and node.materializationType != 'view' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Default Surrogate Key Value
    attributeName: insertZeroKeySurrogateKey
    type: textBox
    defaultValue: "0"
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.insertZeroKey == true and node.materializationType != 'view' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Default Date Value (Date Format DD-MM-YYYY)
    attributeName: insertZeroKeyDate
    type: textBox
    defaultValue: "01-01-1900"
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.insertZeroKey == true and node.materializationType != 'view' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: businessKeyColumns
    isRequired: true
    
  - displayName: Enable Tests
    attributeName: testsEnabled
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType == 'view' %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Pre-SQL
    attributeName: preSQL
    type: textBox
    syntax: sql
    isRequired: false
    
  - displayName: Post-SQL
    attributeName: postSQL
    type: textBox
    syntax: sql
    isRequired: false
    
systemColumns:
- displayName: DATE_KEY
  transform: '{{ config.dateColumnName }}'
  dataType: 'DATE'
  description: "Date in the format YYYY-MM-DD"
  attributeName: isBusinessKey
  placement: beginning
  isBusinessKey: true

- displayName: 'YEAR'
  transform: 'YEAR({{ config.dateColumnName }})'
  dataType: SMALLINT
  description: "Year in the format YYYY"
  placement: beginning
  attributeName: isYear
- displayName: 'MONTH'
  transform: 'MONTH({{ config.dateColumnName }})'
  dataType: SMALLINT
  description: "Month in the format MM"
  placement: beginning
  attributeName: isMonth
- displayName: 'MONTH_NAME'
  transform: 'MONTHNAME({{ config.dateColumnName }})'
  dataType: CHAR(3)
  description: "Month in the format MMM"
  placement: beginning
  attributeName: isMonthName
- displayName: 'DAY_OF_MONTH'
  transform: 'DAY({{ config.dateColumnName }})'
  dataType: SMALLINT
  description: "Day in the format DD"
  placement: beginning
  attributeName: isDayOfMonth
- displayName: 'DAY_OF_WEEK'
  transform: 'DAYOFWEEK({{ config.dateColumnName }})'
  dataType: VARCHAR(9)
  description: "Day of the Week in format DD"
  placement: beginning
  attributeName: isDayOfWeek
- displayName: 'DAY_NAME_OF_WEEK'
  transform: "DAYNAME({{ config.dateColumnName }})"
  dataType: VARCHAR(9)
  description: "Day of the Week in format DDD"
  placement: beginning
  attributeName: isDayNameOfWeek
- displayName: 'WEEK_OF_YEAR'
  transform: 'WEEKOFYEAR({{ config.dateColumnName }})'
  dataType: SMALLINT
  description: "Week of the Year"
  placement: beginning
  attributeName: isWeekOfYear
- displayName: 'DAY_OF_YEAR'
  transform: 'DAYOFYEAR({{ config.dateColumnName }})'
  dataType: SMALLINT
  description: "Day of the year"
  placement: beginning
  attributeName: isYearColumn
- displayName: 'QUARTER_NUMBER'
  transform: "QUARTER({{config.dateColumnName}})"
  dataType: SMALLINT
  description: "Quarter Number of the year (1-4)"
  placement: beginning
  attributeName: isQuarterNumber
- displayName: 'QUARTER'
  transform: "CAST(DATE_FORMAT({{config.dateColumnName}}, 'yyyy') || '0' || CAST(QUARTER({{config.dateColumnName}}) AS STRING) AS INT)"
  dataType: INT
  description: "Year and the Quarter number in the format YYYYQQ"
  placement: beginning
  attributeName: isQuarter
- displayName: 'FLAG_WEEK_DAY'
  transform: "CASE WHEN TO_CHAR({{config.dateColumnName }}, 'Dy') IN ('Sat','Sun') THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END"
  dataType: VARCHAR(9)
  description: "Flag to check week day"
  placement: beginning
  attributeName: isFlagWeekDay
- displayName: 'FLAG_WEEK_END'
  transform: "CASE WHEN TO_CHAR({{config.dateColumnName }}, 'Dy') IN ('Sat','Sun') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END"
  dataType: VARCHAR(9)
  description: "Flag to check weekend"
  placement: beginning
  attributeName: isFlagWeekEnd

- displayName: SYSTEM_CREATE_DATE
  transform: CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS TIMESTAMP)
  dataType: TIMESTAMP
  placement: end
  attributeName: isSystemCreateDate

- displayName: SYSTEM_UPDATE_DATE
  transform: CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS TIMESTAMP)
  dataType: TIMESTAMP
  placement: end
  attributeName: isSystemUpdateDate

capitalized: Copy UNLOAD
short: 'EXPORT'
tagColor: 'dodgerblue'
isDisabled: false
plural: Unloads


config:
- groupName: File Location
  items:
  - displayName: Coalesce Storage Location of Stage
    attributeName: stageStorageLocationName
    type: textBox
    default: 'Enter Storage Location name'
    isRequired: true
    
  - displayName: Stage
    attributeName: fileLocation
    type: textBox
    default:  'Enter stage name-stage_name/folder_name/'
    isRequired: true
     
  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: partitionConfig
    displayName: Partition by(Optional)
    default: false
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileType in ('CSV','PARQUET')) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: partitionConfigExpressions
    displayName: Allow Expressions in partition by clause
    default: false
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.partitionConfig %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"


  - type: tabular
    displayName: 'Partition  By'
    attributeName: partitionbyConfig
    columns:

    -  type: columnDropdownSelector
       displayName: Column Name
       attributeName: columnName
       isRequired: false
  
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if (config.partitionConfig and not config.partitionConfigExpressions) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: tabular
    displayName: 'Partition  By'
    attributeName: partitionbyConfigExpressions
    columns:

    -  type: columnDropdownSelector
       displayName: Column Name
       attributeName: columnNameExpressions
       isRequired: false
  
    -  type: textBox
       displayName: Expression
       attributeName: sqlExpression
       default: "ex. 'date=' || to_varchar(<column_name>, 'YYYY-MM-DD')"
       isRequired: false
  
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if (config.partitionConfig and config.partitionConfigExpressions) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

- groupName: File Format
  items:
      
  - displayName: File Format Definition
    attributeName: fileFormatType
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: "File Format Name"
    options:
    - File Format Name
    - File Format Values

  - displayName: Coalesce Storage Location of File Format 
    attributeName: fileFormatLoc
    type: textBox
    default: ""
    enableIf: "{% if config.fileFormatType == 'File Format Name' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: File Format Name
    attributeName: fileFormatName
    type: textBox
    default: ""
    enableIf: "{% if config.fileFormatType == 'File Format Name' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: File Type
    attributeName: fileType
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: CSV
    options:
    - "CSV"
    - "PARQUET"
    - "JSON"
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Compression
    attributeName: compression
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV','JSON')) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: "AUTO"
    options:
    - "AUTO"
    - "GZIP"
    - "BZ2"
    - "BROTLI"
    - "ZSTD"
    - "DEFLATE"
    - "RAW_DEFLATE"
    - "NONE"
    - ""
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Record delimiter
    attributeName: recDelim
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV')) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    default: "\n"
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Compression
    attributeName: compression1
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('PARQUET')) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: "AUTO"
    options:
    - "AUTO"
    - "LZO"
    - "SNAPPY"
    - "NONE"
    - ""
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Field delimiter
    attributeName: fieldDelim
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV')) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    default: ","
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Field optionally enclosed by
    attributeName: fieldEnclosed
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV')) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    default: "\\042"
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: File extension
    attributeName: file_ext
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV','JSON')) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    type: textBox
    isRequired: false
  
  - displayName: Date format
    attributeName: dateformat
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV')) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    isRequired: false
    default: AUTO

  - displayName: Time format
    attributeName: timeformat
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV')) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    isRequired: false
    default: AUTO

  - displayName: Timestamp format
    attributeName: timestampformat
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV')) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    isRequired: false
    default: AUTO

- groupName: Copy Options
  items:
  - displayName: Overwrite Flag
    attributeName: overwriteFiles
    type: toggleButton
    isRequired: true
    default: false

  - displayName: Header
    attributeName: header
    type: toggleButton
    default: true
    isRequired: true
    

  - displayName: Single File Flag
    attributeName: singleFile
    type: toggleButton
    isRequired: true
    default: false

  - displayName: Max File Size (MB)
    attributeName: sizeLimit
    type: textBox
    default: "16"
    isRequired: true

  - displayName: Include Query ID
    attributeName: queryId
    type: toggleButton
    isRequired: true
    default: false
    

  - displayName: Detailed Output
    attributeName: detailedOutput
    type: toggleButton
    isRequired: true
    default: false

config:
- groupName: Options

  - type: materializationSelector
    default: table

    isRequired: true

  - type: multisourceToggle

    type: textBox

variants.nodeMetadataSpec:
capitalized: Cortex search
short: CSS
tagColor: "#F6FF3C"
isDisabled: true
plural: Dynamic Tables

deployStrategy: advanced
isColumnResyncEnabled: true

config:
  - groupName: General Options
    items: 
    
    - type: toggleButton
      displayName: 'Create Cortex Service'
      attributeName: createcortex

    - type: toggleButton
      displayName: 'Preview/Query the Cortex Service'
      attributeName: querycortex

  - groupName: Cortex search schedule Options
    enableIf: "{%- if config.createcortex -%} true {%- else -%} false {%- endif -%}"
    items:     
     
    - type: label
      attributeName: note2
      displayName: 
                   "NOTE:
                   \n
                   Ensure the parameter targetWarehouse is added in Workspace and 
                   deployment environment  for successful creation of dynamic table.  
                   Refer documentation for more info"
      enableIf: "{%- if parameters == {} or parameters.targetWarehouse == '' -%} true {%- else -%} false {%- endif -%}"

    - displayName: Warehouse used for Cortex serach service
      attributeName: warehouseName
      type: textBox
      default: dev_wh_xs
      isRequired: true

    - type: tabular
      displayName: 'Lag Specification'
      attributeName: lagSpecification
      columns:
  
      -  type: textBox
         displayName: Time Value
         attributeName: lagValue
         default: 60
         isRequired: false
         
      -  type: dropdownSelector
         displayName: Time Period
         attributeName: lagPeriod
         default: "Minutes"
         options:
         - Seconds
         - Minutes
         - Hours
         - Days
         isRequired: false
         
      isRequired: false
      
  - groupName: Cortex search Advanced Options
    enableIf: "{%- if config.createcortex -%} true {%- else -%} false {%- endif -%}"
    items:

    - type: dropdownSelector   
      displayName: Initialize
      attributeName: initialize
      default: "ON_CREATE"
      options:
      - ''
      - ON_CREATE
      - ON_SCHEDULE 
      isRequired: false
   
   
    - type: dropdownSelector   
      displayName: Embedding model
      attributeName: embmodel
      default: ""
      options:
      - ""
      - snowflake-arctic-embed-m-v1.5
      - snowflake-arctic-embed-l-v2.0
      - voyage-multilingual-2 
      isRequired: false

    - type: columnDropdownSelector
      displayName: Search column
      attributeName: searchcol
      isRequired: false
      
    
    - type: tabular
      displayName: 'Attribute Columns'
      attributeName: attrcol
      columns:

      -  type: columnDropdownSelector
         displayName: Column Name
         attributeName: acolname
         isRequired: false

      isRequired: false
    
  - groupName: Preview search Options
    enableIf: "{%- if config.querycortex -%} true {%- else -%} false {%- endif -%}"
    items:

    - type: toggleButton
      displayName:  Use existing Cortex Search Service
      attributeName: excss

    - type: textBox
      displayName: Coalesce storage location of CSS
      enableIf: "{%- if config.excss -%} true {%- else -%} false {%- endif -%}"
      attributeName: locCSS
    
    - type: textBox
      displayName: Name of Cortex Search Service
      enableIf: "{%- if config.excss -%} true {%- else -%} false {%- endif -%}"
      attributeName: namCSS

    - type: toggleButton
      displayName: All Columns in the preview 
      attributeName: allcol
      isRequired: false
   
    - type: tabular
      displayName: 'Columns in Target View'

      isRequired: false

    - type: tabular

      columns:

        displayName: Matching operator
        attributeName: mopt
        default: "eq"
        options:
        - eq
        - gte
        - lte
        - contains
        isRequired: false
      
      - type: textBox
        displayName: Filter Value
        attributeName: filcolval
        isRequired: false
  
      isRequired: false
    
    - type: toggleButton

      attributeName: numboost
      isRequired: false

    - type: tabular
      displayName: 'Numeric boosts'
      attributeName: numericboost

      columns:

         isRequired: false

         displayName: Weightage
         attributeName: wage
         isRequired: false
  
      isRequired: false

    - type: toggleButton
      displayName: Apply time decay to Search Service
      attributeName: timdec
      isRequired: false

    - type: tabular
      displayName: 'Time decays'
      attributeName: timedecay
      enableIf: "{%- if config.timdec -%} true {%- else -%} false {%- endif -%}"
      columns:

      -  type: columnDropdownSelector
         displayName: Column Name
         attributeName: tcolname
         isRequired: false
  
      -  type: textBox
         displayName: Weightage
         attributeName: twage
         isRequired: false

      -  type: textBox
         displayName: Limit hours      
         attributeName: lhours
         isRequired: false
      
      -  type: textBox
         displayName: Refrence timestamp(timestamp from which decay is caluculated)
         attributeName: reftstmp

    enableIf: "false"
    items:
    - displayName: Type

      options:
      - cortex search service

variants.nodeMetadataSpec:
capitalized: Create Or Alter DAG Root Task
short: CRT
plural: Tasks
tagColor: "#AB251A"

deployStrategy: advanced

config:
- groupName: Scheduling Options
  # Schedule mode-specifies whether a warehouse or serverless compute is used to run the task #
  items:
  - displayName: Scheduling Mode
    attributeName: schedulingMode
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: Warehouse Task
    options:
      - Warehouse Task
      - Serverless Task
    isRequired: true

  # Warehouse name you want the task to run #
  - type: label
    attributeName: note2
    displayName: "NOTE: Ensure the parameter targetTaskWarehouse is added in Workspace and Deployment Environment for successful creation of Stream.\nFor more information, refer the documentation."
    enableIf: "{%- if (parameters == {} or parameters.targetTaskWarehouse == '' ) and config.schedulingMode == 'Warehouse Task'-%} true {%- else -%} false {%- endif -%}"

  - displayName: Select Warehouse on which to run task
    attributeName: whName
    type: textBox
    default: '<WAREHOUSE_NAME>'
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulingMode == 'Warehouse Task' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Select initial serverless Warehouse size
    attributeName: serverlessSize
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: 'MEDIUM'
    options:
      - XSMALL
      - SMALL
      - MEDIUM
      - LARGE
      - XLARGE
      - XXLARGE
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulingMode == 'Serverless Task' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

    # Way to schedule the task to run #
  - displayName: Task Schedule
    attributeName: schedulePeriodOption
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: Minutes
    options:
      - Minutes
      - CRON
    isRequired: true

  - displayName: Enter task schedule using minutes
    attributeName: schedulePeriod
    type: textBox
    default: '60'
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption == 'Minutes' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Enter task schedule using CRON
    attributeName: scheduleCRON
    type: textBox
    default: '5 0-23 * * * America/Los_Angeles'
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption == 'CRON' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Root task SQL
    attributeName: tskSql
    type: textBox
    default: 'select current_timestamp()'
    isRequired: true

  - displayName: Task Time Out (0 - 604800000) mlSec
    attributeName: timeOut
    type: textBox
    default: 60000
    isRequired: false

- groupName: Hidden Config
  enableIf: "false"
  items:
  - displayName: Type
    type: materializationSelector
    default: task
    options:
    - task
    isRequired: false
