variants.nodeMetadataSpec:
capitalized: Create or Alter DIM Table
short: CDIM
plural: Dimensions
tagColor: '#333BA6'

deployStrategy: advanced

config:
- groupName: Create Table Options
  items:
  - type: materializationSelector
    default: table
    options:
    - table
    - transient table
    isRequired: true
    
  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: clusterKey
    displayName: Cluster Key
    default: false
    isRequired: false

  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: clusterKeyExpressions
    displayName: Allow Expressions in Cluster Key
    default: false
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.clusterKey %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: tabular
    displayName: 'Cluster Key'
    attributeName: clusterKeyConfig
    columns:

    -  type: columnDropdownSelector
       displayName: Column Name
       attributeName: columnName
       isRequired: false
  
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if (config.clusterKey and not config.clusterKeyExpressions) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: tabular
    displayName: 'Cluster Key'
    attributeName: clusterKeyConfigExpressions
    columns:

    -  type: columnDropdownSelector
       displayName: Column Name
       attributeName: columnNameExpressions
       isRequired: false
  
    -  type: textBox
       displayName: Expression
       attributeName: sqlExpression
       default: "ex. trunc(<column_name>, -5)"
       isRequired: false
  
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if (config.clusterKey and config.clusterKeyExpressions) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: changetracking
    displayName: Change tracking
    default: false
    isRequired: false

  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: eschemaevol
    displayName: Enable Schema Evolution
    default: false
    isRequired: false

  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: inlineconst
    displayName: Inline Constraints
    default: false
    isRequired: false
  
  - type: tabular
    displayName: 'Constraints'
    attributeName: constraintsspec
    columns:

    -  type: columnDropdownSelector
       displayName: Column Name
       attributeName: columnname
       isRequired: false
  
    -  type: textBox
       displayName: Constraint specification
       attributeName: constspec
       default: "ex. COLLATE <collate_specification>"
       isRequired: false
  
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if (config.inlineconst) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: outlineconst
    displayName: Out-of-line Constraints
    default: false
    isRequired: false

  - type: toggleButton
    displayName: Primary key
    attributeName: primary
    enableIf: "{% if (config.outlineconst) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: textBox
    displayName: Primary key Name
    attributeName: primarykeyname
    enableIf: "{% if (config.outlineconst and config.primary) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: tabular   
    displayName: Primary key columns
    attributeName: primarykeycon
    columns:

    -  type: columnDropdownSelector
       displayName: Columns
       attributeName: primarykey

    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if (config.outlineconst and config.primary) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: toggleButton
    displayName: Foreign key
    attributeName: foreignk
    enableIf: "{% if (config.outlineconst) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: tabular   
    displayName: Foreign key attributes
    attributeName: foreignkeycon
    columns:

    - type: textBox
      displayName: Foreign key Name
      attributeName: foreignkeyname
      enableIf: "{% if (config.outlineconst and config.foreignk) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

    - type: textBox
      displayName: Parent table name
      attributeName: parentabname
      default: "ex:`<database>`.`<schema>`.`<tablename>`"
      enableIf: "{% if (config.outlineconst and config.foreignk) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

    - type: textBox
      displayName: Foreign key columns
      attributeName: foreignkeycol
      
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if (config.outlineconst and config.foreignk ) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Data Retention Time(In days-'<integer>')
    attributeName: datretention
    type: textBox
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType == 'table' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Maximum Data Extension time(In days-'<integer>')
    attributeName: maxdataretention
    type: textBox
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType == 'table' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
  
  - displayName: Default DDL Collation('<collation specification>')
    attributeName: defaultcoallation
    type: textBox
    isRequired: false

- groupName: Insert Data Options
  items:
 
  - type: multisourceToggle
    enableIf: "{% if node.override.create.enabled %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}" 
    
  - displayName: Multi Source Strategy
    attributeName: insertStrategy
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: UNION
    options:
    - "UNION"
    - "UNION ALL"
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.isMultisource %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Truncate Before
    attributeName: truncateBefore
    type: toggleButton
    default: true

  - displayName: Enable Tests
    attributeName: testsEnabled
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    
  - type: businessKeyColumns
    isRequired: true

  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: lastModifiedComparison
    displayName: Last Modified Comparison
    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view'%} true {%else%} false {%endif%}"
    
  - type: label
    attributeName: l1
    displayName: Columns can either be a timestamp or incremental id column
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' and config.lastModifiedComparison %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    
  - type: columnDropdownSelector
    attributeName: lastModifiedColumn
    displayName: Last Modified Column
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' and config.lastModifiedComparison %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: label
    attributeName: l2
    displayName: The below toggle is applicable only for timestamp column
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' and config.lastModifiedComparison %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: treatNullAsCurrentTimestamp
    displayName: Treat NULL as Current Timestamp
    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.lastModifiedComparison %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: type2Dimension
    displayName: Type 2 Dimension
    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.lastModifiedComparison  %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: changeTrackingColumns
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.lastModifiedComparison  or node.materializationType == 'view' %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Distinct
    attributeName: selectDistinct
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.groupByAll or  node.override.create.enabled %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Group By All
    attributeName: groupByAll
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.selectDistinct or  node.override.create.enabled %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Order By
    attributeName: orderby
    type: toggleButton
    default: false

  - type: tabular
    displayName: 'Sort column'
    attributeName: orderbycolumn
    columns:

      -  type: columnDropdownSelector
         displayName: Column Name
         attributeName: sortColName

      -  type: dropdownSelector
         displayName: Sort Order
         attributeName: sortOrder
         default: desc
         options:
         - desc
         - asc
       
    isRequired: true
    enableIf: "{% if config.orderby %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
	
  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: insertZeroKey
    displayName: Insert Zero Key Record
    default: false

- groupName: Zero Key Record Options
  items:
  - displayName: Default Surrogate Key Value
    attributeName: insertZeroKeySurrogateKey
    type: textBox
    default: "0"
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.insertZeroKey %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Default String Value
    attributeName: insertZeroKeyStr
    type: textBox
    default: "UNKNOWN"
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.insertZeroKey %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Default Date Value (Date Format DD-MM-YYYY)
    attributeName: insertZeroKeyDate
    type: textBox
    default: "01-01-1900"
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.insertZeroKey %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Default Timestamp Value (Timestamp Format YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS.FF)
    attributeName: insertZeroKeyTimestamp
    type: textBox
    default: "1900-01-01 00:00:00.000"
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.insertZeroKey %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    
  - displayName: Default Boolean Value
    attributeName: insertZeroKeyBol
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: "TRUE"
    isRequired: false
    options:
    - "TRUE"
    - "FALSE"
    enableIf: "{% if config.insertZeroKey %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: insertZeroKeyAdvanced
    displayName: Advanced Zero Key Record Options
    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if (node.materializationType == 'table'  and config.insertZeroKey) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: tabular
    displayName: 'Custom Zero Key Values'
    attributeName: customZeroKeyValues
    columns:

    - type: columnDropdownSelector
      displayName: Column
      attributeName: columnNameDefault
      isRequired: false
      enableIf: "{% if config.insertZeroKey and config.insertZeroKeyAdvanced %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
  
    -  type: textBox
       displayName: Default Value
       attributeName: columnValueDefault
       isRequired: false
       enableIf: "{% if config.insertZeroKey and config.insertZeroKeyAdvanced %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
  
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.insertZeroKey and config.insertZeroKeyAdvanced %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
  enableIf: "{% if config.insertZeroKey %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

systemColumns:

- displayName: '{{NODE_NAME}}_KEY'
  transform: ''
  dataType: NUMBER
  placement: beginning
  attributeName: isSurrogateKey

- displayName: SYSTEM_UPDATE_DATE
  transform: CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS TIMESTAMP)
  dataType: TIMESTAMP
  placement: end
  attributeName: isSystemUpdateDate

  placement: end
  attributeName: isSystemCreateDate

- displayName: SYSTEM_UPDATE_DATE

  placement: end

       displayName: Expression

       isRequired: false
  
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if (config.clusterKey and config.clusterKeyExpressions) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: changetracking
    displayName: Change tracking
    default: false
    isRequired: false

    attributeName: eschemaevol

    default: false
    isRequired: false

  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: inlineconst

    default: false
    isRequired: false

    displayName: 'Constraints'

       isRequired: false

       displayName: Constraint specification
       attributeName: constspec
       default: "ex. COLLATE <collate_specification>"
       isRequired: false
  
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if (config.inlineconst) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: outlineconst

    default: false

    isRequired: false

    default: ''

    attributeName: maxdataretention
    type: textBox
    default: ''
    isRequired: false

    attributeName: defaultcoallation
    type: textBox
    default: ''
    isRequired: false
    
- groupName: Insert Data Options
  items:

    attributeName: devMode

    default: true
 
  - type: multisourceToggle
    
  - displayName: Multi Source Strategy
    attributeName: insertStrategy
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: UNION

    - "UNION"
    - "UNION ALL"

  - displayName: Truncate Before
    attributeName: truncateBefore
    type: toggleButton

    attributeName: selectDistinct

    default: false

  - displayName: Group By All
    attributeName: groupByAll
    type: toggleButton
    default: false

  - displayName: Order By
    attributeName: orderby

    default: false

      -  type: columnDropdownSelector

         - desc
         - asc
       
    isRequired: true
    enableIf: "{% if config.orderby %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  # Schedule mode-specifies whether a warehouse or serverless compute is used to run the task #
  enableIf: "{% if config.devMode %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}" 

  items:

    attributeName: schedulingMode

    default: Warehouse Task
    options:

      - Serverless Task

    attributeName: flagSrcStream

    attributeName: multiStreamBehavior

      - OR
    isRequired: true

    attributeName: serverlessSize
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: 'MEDIUM'
    options:
      - XSMALL
      - SMALL
      - MEDIUM
      - LARGE
      - XLARGE
      - XXLARGE
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulingMode == 'Serverless Task' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

    # Way to schedule the task to run #
  - displayName: Task Schedule
    attributeName: schedulePeriodOption
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: Predecessor
    options:
      - Minutes
      - CRON
      - Predecessor
    isRequired: true

  - displayName: Enter task schedule using minutes
    attributeName: schedulePeriod
    type: textBox
    default: '60'
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption == 'Minutes' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Enter task schedule using CRON
    attributeName: scheduleCRON
    type: textBox
    default: '5 0-23 * * * America/Los_Angeles'
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption == 'CRON' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Enter predecessor task(s) separated by a comma
    attributeName: predTask
    type: textBox
    default: 'DATA_TRANSFORMATION_ROOT_TASK'
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption == 'Predecessor' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Enter root task name
    attributeName: rootTask
    type: textBox
    default: 'DATA_TRANSFORMATION_ROOT_TASK'
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption == 'Predecessor' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Task Time Out (0 - 604800000) mlSec
    attributeName: timeOut
    type: textBox
    default: 60000
    isRequired: false

  enableIf: "false"
  items:
  - displayName: Type
    type: materializationSelector

    options:
    - task
    isRequired: false

variants.nodeMetadataSpec:
capitalized: Date Dimension
short: DIM_DATE
plural: Dates
tagColor: 'black'

deployStrategy: advanced

config:
- groupName: Date Options
  items:
  - displayName: Starting Date
    attributeName: startingDate
    type: textBox
    syntax: sql
    default: 'DATEADD(DAY, -730, CURRENT_DATE)'
    isRequired: true

  - displayName: Number of Days to Generate
    attributeName: daysToGenerate
    type: textBox
    default: '2000'
    isRequired: true
    
  - displayName: Generated Date Column Name
    attributeName: dateColumnName
    type: textBox
    default: '`DATE_COL`'
    isRequired: true

- groupName: Additional Options
  items:
  - type: materializationSelector
    default: table
    options:
    - table
    - view
    isRequired: true

  - type: overrideSQLToggle
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType == 'view' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Truncate Before
    attributeName: truncateBefore
    type: toggleButton
    default: true
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: insertZeroKey
    displayName: Insert Zero Key Record
    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType == 'table' or node.materializationType == 'transient table'%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Default String Value
    attributeName: insertZeroKeyStr
    type: textBox
    defaultValue: "UNKNOWN"
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.insertZeroKey == true and node.materializationType != 'view' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Default Surrogate Key Value
    attributeName: insertZeroKeySurrogateKey
    type: textBox
    defaultValue: "0"
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.insertZeroKey == true and node.materializationType != 'view' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Default Date Value (Date Format DD-MM-YYYY)
    attributeName: insertZeroKeyDate
    type: textBox
    defaultValue: "01-01-1900"
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.insertZeroKey == true and node.materializationType != 'view' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: businessKeyColumns
    isRequired: true
    
  - displayName: Enable Tests
    attributeName: testsEnabled
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType == 'view' %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Pre-SQL
    attributeName: preSQL
    type: textBox
    syntax: sql
    isRequired: false
    
  - displayName: Post-SQL
    attributeName: postSQL
    type: textBox
    syntax: sql
    isRequired: false
    
systemColumns:
- displayName: DATE_KEY
  transform: '{{ config.dateColumnName }}'
  dataType: 'DATE'
  description: "Date in the format YYYY-MM-DD"
  attributeName: isBusinessKey
  placement: beginning
  isBusinessKey: true

- displayName: 'YEAR'
  transform: 'YEAR({{ config.dateColumnName }})'
  dataType: SMALLINT
  description: "Year in the format YYYY"
  placement: beginning
  attributeName: isYear

- displayName: 'MONTH'
  transform: 'MONTH({{ config.dateColumnName }})'
  dataType: SMALLINT
  description: "Month in the format MM"
  placement: beginning
  attributeName: isMonth

- displayName: 'MONTH_NAME'
  transform: 'MONTHNAME({{ config.dateColumnName }})'
  dataType: CHAR(3)
  description: "Month in the format MMM"
  placement: beginning
  attributeName: isMonthName

- displayName: 'DAY_OF_MONTH'
  transform: 'DAY({{ config.dateColumnName }})'
  dataType: SMALLINT
  description: "Day in the format DD"
  placement: beginning
  attributeName: isDayOfMonth

- displayName: 'DAY_OF_WEEK'
  transform: 'DAYOFWEEK({{ config.dateColumnName }})'
  dataType: VARCHAR(9)
  description: "Day of the Week in format DD"
  placement: beginning
  attributeName: isDayOfWeek

- displayName: 'DAY_NAME_OF_WEEK'
  transform: "DAYNAME({{ config.dateColumnName }})"
  dataType: VARCHAR(9)
  description: "Day of the Week in format DDD"
  placement: beginning
  attributeName: isDayNameOfWeek

- displayName: 'WEEK_OF_YEAR'
  transform: 'WEEKOFYEAR({{ config.dateColumnName }})'
  dataType: SMALLINT
  description: "Week of the Year"
  placement: beginning
  attributeName: isWeekOfYear

- displayName: 'DAY_OF_YEAR'
  transform: 'DAYOFYEAR({{ config.dateColumnName }})'
  dataType: SMALLINT
  description: "Day of the year"
  placement: beginning
  attributeName: isYearColumn
  
- displayName: 'QUARTER_NUMBER'
  transform: "QUARTER({{config.dateColumnName}})"
  dataType: SMALLINT
  description: "Quarter Number of the year (1-4)"
  placement: beginning
  attributeName: isQuarterNumber
  
- displayName: 'QUARTER'
  transform: "CAST(DATE_FORMAT({{config.dateColumnName}}, 'yyyy') || '0' || CAST(QUARTER({{config.dateColumnName}}) AS STRING) AS INT)"

  dataType: INT
  description: "Year and the Quarter number in the format YYYYQQ"
  placement: beginning
  attributeName: isQuarter
- displayName: 'FLAG_WEEK_DAY'
  transform: "CASE WHEN DAYNAME({{config.dateColumnName }}) IN ('Sat','Sun') THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END"

  dataType: VARCHAR(9)
  description: "Flag to check week day"
  placement: beginning

    attributeName: pdeploy

  - displayName: Truncate Before

systemColumns:
- displayName: DATE_KEY
  transform: '{{ config.dateColumnName }}'
  dataType: 'DATE'
  description: "Date in the format YYYY-MM-DD"
  attributeName: isBusinessKey
  placement: beginning
  isBusinessKey: true

- displayName: 'YEAR'
  transform: 'YEAR({{ config.dateColumnName }})'
  dataType: SMALLINT
  description: "Year in the format YYYY"
  placement: beginning
  attributeName: isYear
- displayName: 'MONTH'
  transform: 'MONTH({{ config.dateColumnName }})'
  dataType: SMALLINT
  description: "Month in the format MM"
  placement: beginning
  attributeName: isMonth
- displayName: 'MONTH_NAME'
  transform: 'MONTHNAME({{ config.dateColumnName }})'
  dataType: CHAR(3)
  description: "Month in the format MMM"
  placement: beginning
  attributeName: isMonthName
- displayName: 'DAY_OF_MONTH'
  transform: 'DAY({{ config.dateColumnName }})'
  dataType: SMALLINT
  description: "Day in the format DD"
  placement: beginning
  attributeName: isDayOfMonth
- displayName: 'DAY_OF_WEEK'
  transform: 'DAYOFWEEK({{ config.dateColumnName }})'
  dataType: VARCHAR(9)
  description: "Day of the Week in format DD"
  placement: beginning
  attributeName: isDayOfWeek
- displayName: 'DAY_NAME_OF_WEEK'
  transform: "TO_CHAR({{ config.dateColumnName }}, 'Dy')"
  dataType: VARCHAR(9)
  description: "Day of the Week in format DDD"
  placement: beginning
  attributeName: isDayNameOfWeek
- displayName: 'WEEK_OF_YEAR'
  transform: 'WEEKOFYEAR({{ config.dateColumnName }})'
  dataType: SMALLINT
  description: "Week of the Year"
  placement: beginning
  attributeName: isWeekOfYear
- displayName: 'DAY_OF_YEAR'
  transform: 'DAYOFYEAR({{ config.dateColumnName }})'
  dataType: SMALLINT
  description: "Day of the year"
  placement: beginning
  attributeName: isYearColumn
- displayName: 'QUARTER_NUMBER'
  transform: "TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(DATE_PART('Q',{{config.dateColumnName}})), '9')"
  dataType: SMALLINT
  description: "Quarter Number of the year (1-4)"
  placement: beginning
  attributeName: isQuarterNumber
- displayName: 'QUARTER'
  transform: "TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR({{config.dateColumnName}}, 'YYYY') || '0' || TO_CHAR(DATE_PART('Q',{{config.dateColumnName}})), '999999')"
  dataType: SMALLINT
  description: "Year and the Quarter number in the format YYYYQQ"
  placement: beginning
  attributeName: isQuarter
- displayName: 'FLAG_WEEK_DAY'
  transform: "CASE WHEN TO_CHAR({{config.dateColumnName }}, 'Dy') IN ('Sat','Sun') THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END"
  dataType: VARCHAR(9)
  description: "Flag to check week day"
  placement: beginning
  attributeName: isFlagWeekDay
- displayName: 'FLAG_WEEK_END'
  transform: "CASE WHEN TO_CHAR({{config.dateColumnName }}, 'Dy') IN ('Sat','Sun') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END"
  dataType: VARCHAR(9)
  description: "Flag to check weekend"
  placement: beginning
  attributeName: isFlagWeekEnd

- displayName: SYSTEM_CREATE_DATE
  transform: CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS TIMESTAMP)
  dataType: TIMESTAMP
  placement: end
  attributeName: isSystemCreateDate

- displayName: SYSTEM_UPDATE_DATE
  transform: CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS TIMESTAMP)
  dataType: TIMESTAMP
  placement: end
  attributeName: isSystemUpdateDate

capitalized: Deferred Merge - Append Stream
short: AP
tagColor: black
plural: Deferred Merge

deployStrategy: advanced


config:
- groupName: General Options
  items:
  - displayName: Development Mode
    attributeName: devMode
    type: toggleButton
    isRequired: true
    default: true
 
  - displayName: Create Target As
    type: dropdownSelector
    attributeName: createas
    default: table
    options:
    - table
    - transient table
    isRequired: true

- groupName: Stream Options
  items:
  - displayName: Source Object
    attributeName: sourceType
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: Table
    options:
      - Table
      - View
      - External Iceberg Table
    isRequired: false



  - displayName: Show Initial Rows
    attributeName: initialRows
    type: toggleButton
    default: true
    isRequired: true
    enableIf: "{% if config.sourceType == 'Table' or config.sourceType == 'View' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Redeployment Behavior
    attributeName: redeploymentBehavior
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: Create At Existing Stream
    options:
       - Create or Replace
       - Create If Not Exists
       - Create At Existing Stream
    isRequired: true


  

  - displayName: Insert Only
    attributeName: insertOnly
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    isRequired: true
    enableIf: "{% if config.sourceType == 'External Table' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

- groupName: Target Loading Options
  items:
  - type: tabular
    displayName: 'Table Key(s)'
    attributeName: partitionBy
    columns:
  
    -  type: columnDropdownSelector
       displayName: Column Name
       attributeName: partColName
       isRequired: true
        
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Record Versioning
    attributeName: recordVersioning
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: Datetime Column
    options:
      - Datetime Column
      - Date Column and Time Column
    isRequired: true

  - type: tabular
    displayName: 'Timestamp or Sequence'
    attributeName: orderBy
    columns:
  
    -  type: columnDropdownSelector
       displayName: Column Name
       attributeName: colName
       isRequired: true
       enableIf: "{% if config.recordVersioning in ('Datetime Column','Numeric Column') %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    
    -  type: dropdownSelector
       displayName: Sort Order
       attributeName: sortOrd
       default: desc
       options:
       - desc
       - asc
       isRequired: true
       enableIf: "{% if config.recordVersioning in ('Datetime Column','Numeric Column') %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.recordVersioning in ('Datetime Column','Numeric Column') %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: tabular
    displayName: 'Date / Timestamp Columns'
    attributeName: orderByDateTime
    columns:
  
    -  type: columnDropdownSelector
       displayName: Date Column
       attributeName: colNameDate
       isRequired: true
       enableIf: "{% if config.recordVersioning in ('Date Column and Time Column') %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    
    -  type: columnDropdownSelector
       displayName: Timestamp Column
       attributeName: colNameTimestamp
       isRequired: true
       enableIf: "{% if config.recordVersioning in ('Date Column and Time Column') %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    
    -  type: dropdownSelector
       displayName: Sort Order
       attributeName: sortOrdDateTimestamp
       default: desc
       options:
       - desc
       - asc
       isRequired: true
       enableIf: "{% if config.recordVersioning in ('Date Column and Time Column') %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.recordVersioning in ('Date Column and Time Column') %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

- groupName: Target Row DML Operations
  items:
  - displayName: Column that Identifies DML Operations
    attributeName: dmlCol
    type: columnDropdownSelector
    isRequired: true

  - displayName: Include Value for Update
    attributeName: capUpdate
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    isRequired: false
 
  - displayName: Insert Value
    attributeName: dmlInsert
    type: textBox
    default: I
    isRequired: true
 
  - displayName: Update Value
    attributeName: dmlUpdate
    type: textBox
    default: U
    isRequired: true
    enableIf: "{% if config.capUpdate == true %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
 
  - displayName: Delete Value
    attributeName: dmlDelete
    type: textBox
    default: D
    isRequired: true
 
- groupName: Target Delete Options
  items:
  - displayName: Soft Delete
    attributeName: softDeleteFlag
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Retain Last Non-Deleted Values
    attributeName: retainLastNonDeleteFlag
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    isRequired: false
 
- groupName: Target Clustering Options
  items:

    # Cluster Key-Determine if a node is to be clustered or not #
  
  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: clusterKey
    displayName: Cluster Key
    default: false
    isRequired: false

  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: clusterKeyExpressions
    displayName: Allow Expressions in Cluster Key
    default: false
    isRequired: true
    enableIf: "{% if config.clusterKey %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: tabular
    displayName: 'Cluster Key'
    attributeName: clusterKeyConfig
    columns:

    -  type: columnDropdownSelector
       displayName: Column Name
       attributeName: columnName
       isRequired: false
  
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if (config.clusterKey and not config.clusterKeyExpressions) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: tabular
    displayName: 'Cluster Key'
    attributeName: clusterKeyConfigExpressions
    columns:

    -  type: columnDropdownSelector
       displayName: Column Name
       attributeName: columnNameExpressions
       isRequired: false
  
    -  type: textBox
       displayName: Expression
       attributeName: sqlExpression
       default: "ex. trunc(<column_name>, -5)"
       isRequired: false
  
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if (config.clusterKey and config.clusterKeyExpressions) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

 
- groupName: Scheduling Options
  items:
  - displayName: Scheduling Options
    attributeName: schedulingMode
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: Warehouse Task
    options:
      - Warehouse Task
      - Serverless Task
    isRequired: true

  - displayName: When Source Stream has Data Flag
    attributeName: flagSrcStream
    type: toggleButton
    default: true
    isRequired: true

  - type: label
    attributeName: note2
    displayName: 
                   "NOTE:
                   \n
                   Ensure the parameter targetTaskWarehouse is added in Workspace and 
                   deployment environment  for successful creation of Steam.  
                   For more information, refer to the documentation."
    enableIf: "{%- if (parameters == {} or parameters.targetTaskWarehouse == '' ) and config.schedulingMode == 'Warehouse Task'-%} true {%- else -%} false {%- endif -%}"

  - displayName: Select Warehouse on which to run task
    attributeName: whName
    type: textBox
    default: '<WAREHOUSE_NAME>'
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulingMode == 'Warehouse Task' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Select initial serverless Warehouse size
    attributeName: serverlessSize
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: 'MEDIUM'
    options:
      - XSMALL
      - SMALL
      - MEDIUM
      - LARGE
      - XLARGE
      - XXLARGE
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulingMode == 'Serverless Task' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Task Schedule
    attributeName: schedulePeriodOption
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: Minutes
    options:
      - Minutes
      - CRON
      - Predecessor
    isRequired: TRUE

  - displayName: Enter task schedule using minutes
    attributeName: schedulePeriod
    type: textBox
    default: '60'
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption == 'Minutes' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Enter task schedule using CRON
    attributeName: scheduleCRON
    type: textBox
    default: '5 0-23 * * * America/Los_Angeles'
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption == 'CRON' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Enter predecessor task(s) seperated by a comma 
    attributeName: predTask
    type: textBox
    default: ""
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption == 'Predecessor' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Enter root task name
    attributeName: rootTask
    type: textBox
    default: ""
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption == 'Predecessor' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
  enableIf: "{% if config.devMode == true %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"

    enableIf: "{% if config.recordVersioning in ('Date Column and Time Column') %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

- groupName: Target Row DML Operations
  items:
  - displayName: Column that Identifies DML Operations
    attributeName: dmlCol
    type: columnDropdownSelector
    isRequired: true


  - displayName: Include Value for Update
    attributeName: capUpdate
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    isRequired: false
 
  - displayName: Insert Value
    attributeName: dmlInsert
    type: textBox
    default: I
    isRequired: true
 
  - displayName: Update Value
    attributeName: dmlUpdate
    type: textBox
    default: U
    isRequired: true
    enableIf: "{% if config.capUpdate == true %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
 
  - displayName: Delete Value
    attributeName: dmlDelete
    type: textBox
    default: D
    isRequired: true
 
- groupName: Target Delete Options
  items:
  - displayName: Soft Delete
    attributeName: softDeleteFlag
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Retain Last Non-Deleted Values
    attributeName: retainLastNonDeleteFlag
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    isRequired: false
 
- groupName: Target Clustering Options
  items:

    # Cluster Key-Determine if a node is to be clustered or not #
  
  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: clusterKey
    displayName: Cluster Key
    default: false
    isRequired: false

  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: clusterKeyExpressions
    displayName: Allow Expressions in Cluster Key
    default: false
    isRequired: true
    enableIf: "{% if config.clusterKey %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: tabular
    displayName: 'Cluster Key'
    attributeName: clusterKeyConfig
    columns:

    -  type: columnDropdownSelector
       displayName: Column Name
       attributeName: columnName
       isRequired: false
  
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if (config.clusterKey and not config.clusterKeyExpressions) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: tabular
    displayName: 'Cluster Key'
    attributeName: clusterKeyConfigExpressions
    columns:

    -  type: columnDropdownSelector
       displayName: Column Name
       attributeName: columnNameExpressions
       isRequired: false
  
    -  type: textBox
       displayName: Expression
       attributeName: sqlExpression
       default: "ex. trunc(<column_name>, -5)"
       isRequired: false
  
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if (config.clusterKey and config.clusterKeyExpressions) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
 
- groupName: Scheduling Options
  items:
  - displayName: Scheduling Options
    attributeName: schedulingMode
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: Warehouse Task
    options:
      - Warehouse Task
      - Serverless Task
    isRequired: true

  - displayName: When Source Stream has Data Flag
    attributeName: flagSrcStream
    type: toggleButton
    default: true
    isRequired: true

  - type: label
    attributeName: note2
    displayName: 
                   "NOTE:
                   \n
                   Ensure the parameter targetTaskWarehouse is added in Workspace and 
                   deployment environment  for successful creation of Steam.  
                   For more information, refer to the documentation."
    enableIf: "{%- if (parameters == {} or parameters.targetTaskWarehouse == '' ) and config.schedulingMode == 'Warehouse Task'-%} true {%- else -%} false {%- endif -%}"

  - displayName: Select Warehouse on which to run task
    attributeName: whName
    type: textBox
    default: '<WAREHOUSE_NAME>'
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulingMode == 'Warehouse Task' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Select initial serverless Warehouse size
    attributeName: serverlessSize
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: 'MEDIUM'
    options:
      - XSMALL
      - SMALL
      - MEDIUM
      - LARGE
      - XLARGE
      - XXLARGE
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulingMode == 'Serverless Task' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Task Schedule
    attributeName: schedulePeriodOption
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: Minutes
    options:
      - Minutes
      - CRON
      - Predecessor
    isRequired: TRUE

  - displayName: Enter task schedule using minutes
    attributeName: schedulePeriod
    type: textBox
    default: '60'
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption == 'Minutes' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Enter task schedule using CRON
    attributeName: scheduleCRON
    type: textBox
    default: '5 0-23 * * * America/Los_Angeles'
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption == 'CRON' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Enter predecessor task(s) seperated by a comma 
    attributeName: predTask
    type: textBox
    default: ""
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption == 'Predecessor' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Enter root task name
    attributeName: rootTask
    type: textBox
    default: ""
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption == 'Predecessor' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
  enableIf: "{% if config.devMode == true %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"

  attributeName: hmUpdTs

variants.nodeMetadataSpec:
capitalized: Delta Stream Merge
short: DSM
tagColor: "#525252"
plural: Streams and Merges
 
deployStrategy: advanced
 
config:
- groupName: General Options
  items:
  - displayName: Development Mode
    attributeName: devMode
    type: toggleButton
    isRequired: true
    default: true
 
  - displayName: Create As
    attributeName: createas
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: table
    options:
    - table
    - transient table
    isRequired: true
 
- groupName: Stream Options
  items:
  - displayName: Source Object
    attributeName: sourceType
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: Table
    options:
      - Table
      - Dynamic Table
      - View
      - External Table
      - External Iceberg Table
    isRequired: true
 
  - displayName: Show Initial Rows
    attributeName: initialRows
    type: toggleButton
    default: true
    isRequired: true
    enableIf: "{% if config.sourceType == 'Table' or config.sourceType == 'Dynamic Table' or config.sourceType == 'View' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
 
  - displayName: Redeployment Behavior
    attributeName: redeploymentBehavior
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: Create or Replace
    options:
      - Create or Replace
      - Create If Not Exists
      - Create At Existing Stream
    isRequired: true
 
- groupName: Target Loading Options
  items:
  - displayName: Load Type
    attributeName: loadType
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: Merge
    options:
      - Merge
    isRequired: true
    enableIf: "false"
 
  - type: tabular
    displayName: 'Table Key(s)'
    attributeName: partitionBy
    columns:
 
    -  type: columnDropdownSelector
       displayName: Column Name
       attributeName: partColName
       isRequired: false
       
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.loadType == 'Merge' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
 
  - type: tabular
    displayName: 'Record Date / Timestamp'
    attributeName: orderBy
    columns:
 
    -  type: columnDropdownSelector
       displayName: Column Name
       attributeName: colName
       isRequired: false
   
    -  type: dropdownSelector
       displayName: Sort Order
       attributeName: sortOrd
       default: desc
       options:
       - desc
       - asc
       isRequired: false
   
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.loadType == 'Merge' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
      
  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: latestRowFromSource
    displayName: Qualifies selection based on Table Key and Record Date / Timestamp
    default: false
    isRequired: false
 
  # Cluster Key-Determine if a node is to be clustered or not #
 
  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: clusterKey
    displayName: Cluster Key
    default: false
    isRequired: false
 
  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: clusterKeyExpressions
    displayName: Allow Expressions in Cluster Key
    default: false
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.clusterKey %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
 
  - type: tabular
    displayName: 'Cluster Key'
    attributeName: clusterKeyConfig
    columns:
 
    -  type: columnDropdownSelector
       displayName: Column Name
       attributeName: columnName
       isRequired: false
 
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if (config.clusterKey and not config.clusterKeyExpressions) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
 
  - type: tabular
    displayName: 'Cluster Key'
    attributeName: clusterKeyConfigExpressions
    columns:
 
    -  type: columnDropdownSelector
       displayName: Column Name
       attributeName: columnNameExpressions
       isRequired: false
 
    -  type: textBox
       displayName: Expression
       attributeName: sqlExpression
       default: "ex. trunc(<column_name>, -5)"
       isRequired: false
 
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if (config.clusterKey and config.clusterKeyExpressions) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
 
- groupName: Scheduling Options
 
# Schedule mode-Specifies whether a warehouse or serverless compute is used to run the task #
  enableIf: "{% if config.devMode == true %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"
  items:

# Checks whether source streams have data before executing a task #
  - displayName: When Source Stream has Data Flag
    attributeName: flagSrcStream
    type: toggleButton
    default: true
    isRequired: true

  - displayName: Scheduling Mode
    attributeName: schedulingMode
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: Warehouse Task
    options:
      - Warehouse Task
      - Serverless Task
    isRequired: true
 
# Warehouse name  you want the task to run #
  - type: label
    attributeName: note2
    displayName: 
                   "NOTE:
                   \n
                   Ensure the parameter targetTaskWarehouse is added in Workspace and 
                   deployment environment  for successful creation of Steam.  
                   For more information, refer to the documentation."
    enableIf: "{%- if (parameters == {} or parameters.targetTaskWarehouse == '' ) and config.schedulingMode == 'Warehouse Task'-%} true {%- else -%} false {%- endif -%}"
    
  - displayName: Select Warehouse on which to run task
    attributeName: whName
    type: textBox
    default: '<WAREHOUSE_NAME>'
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulingMode == 'Warehouse Task' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
 
  - displayName: Select initial serverless Warehouse size
    attributeName: serverlessSize
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: '3. MEDIUM'
    options:
      - 1. XSMALL
      - 2. SMALL
      - 3. MEDIUM
      - 4. LARGE
      - 5. XLARGE
      - 6. XXLARGE
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulingMode == 'Serverless Task' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Enable Size Bounds
    attributeName: sizeBoundToggle
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulingMode == 'Serverless Task' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: label
    attributeName: boundErr
    displayName: "⚠️ Warning! Min size ≤ Initial size ≤ Max size"
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulingMode == 'Serverless Task'
                  and config.sizeBoundToggle
                  and 
                  (
                    config.minServerlessSize.split('.')[0] | int >= config.serverlessSize.split('.')[0] | int
                    or config.maxServerlessSize.split('.')[0] | int <= config.serverlessSize.split('.')[0] | int
                    or config.maxServerlessSize.split('.')[0] | int <= config.minServerlessSize.split('.')[0] | int
                  )
                %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Minimum Warehouse Size
    attributeName: minServerlessSize
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: '1. XSMALL'
    options:
      - 1. XSMALL
      - 2. SMALL
      - 3. MEDIUM
      - 4. LARGE
      - 5. XLARGE
      - 6. XXLARGE
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulingMode == 'Serverless Task' and config.sizeBoundToggle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Maximum Warehouse Size
    attributeName: maxServerlessSize
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: '6. XXLARGE'
    options:
      - 1. XSMALL
      - 2. SMALL
      - 3. MEDIUM
      - 4. LARGE
      - 5. XLARGE
      - 6. XXLARGE
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulingMode == 'Serverless Task' and config.sizeBoundToggle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

# Way to schedule the task to run #
 
  - displayName: Task Schedule
    attributeName: schedulePeriodOption
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: Predecessor
    options:
      - Minutes
      - CRON
      - Predecessor
    isRequired: true
 
  - type: tabular
    displayName: Execution Time [💡Seconds(10 - 691200), Minutes(1 - 11520), Hours(1 - 192)]
    attributeName: execTime

    columns:

    -  type: textBox
       displayName: ''
       attributeName: value
       default: 60
       isRequired: false

    -  type: dropdownSelector
       displayName: ''
       attributeName: period
       default: "Minutes"
       options:
        - Seconds
        - Minutes
        - Hours
       isRequired: false

    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption == 'Minutes' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
 
  - displayName: Enter task schedule using CRON
    attributeName: scheduleCRON
    type: textBox
    default: '5 0-23 * * * America/Los_Angeles'
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption == 'CRON' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
 
  - displayName: Enter predecessor task(s) separated by a comma
    attributeName: predTask
    type: textBox
    default: 'DATA_TRANSFORMATION_ROOT_TASK'
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption == 'Predecessor' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
 
  - displayName: Enter root task name
    attributeName: rootTask
    type: textBox
    default: 'DATA_TRANSFORMATION_ROOT_TASK'
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption == 'Predecessor' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

- groupName: Advanced Scheduling Options
  enableIf: "{% if config.devMode %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"
  items:

  - displayName: Execute As Specific User
    attributeName: spfcUserToggle
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    isRequired: false

  - type: label
    attributeName: userInfo
    displayName: "ℹ️ Runs the task on behalf of a specified user account. Requires GRANT IMPERSONATE ON USER privilege."
    enableIf: "{% if config.spfcUserToggle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: label
    attributeName: warningSpfcUser
    displayName: "⚠️ Warning: targetTaskExecuteAsUser parameter is not provided."
    enableIf: "{% if config.spfcUserToggle and parameters.targetTaskExecuteAsUser | trim | default('') == '' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: User Name
    attributeName: userName
    type: textBox
    default: ''
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.spfcUserToggle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Allow Overlapping Execution
    attributeName: overlapExecToggle
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption not in ['Predecessor'] %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Enable Task Graph Config
    attributeName: taskGraphToggle
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption not in ['Predecessor'] %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Configuration JSON
    attributeName: configJSON
    type: textBox
    default: ''
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption not in ['Predecessor'] and config.taskGraphToggle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Auto-Suspend After Failures
    attributeName: autoSuspendToggle
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption not in ['Predecessor'] %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Number of Consecutive Failures (💡Range. 0 - No Limit)
    attributeName: numFailures
    type: textBox
    default: '10'
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption not in ['Predecessor'] and config.autoSuspendToggle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Enable Auto-Retry
    attributeName: autoRetryToggle
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption not in ['Predecessor'] %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Retry Attempts (💡Range. 0 - 30)
    attributeName: retryAttmpt
    type: textBox
    default: '0'
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption not in ['Predecessor'] and config.autoSuspendToggle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

- groupName: Notification Options
  enableIf: "{% if config.devMode or config.schedulePeriodOption in ['Predecessor'] %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"
  items:

  - displayName: Enable Error Notifications
    attributeName: errNotifyToggle
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    isRequired: false

  - type: label
    attributeName: warningErrIntName
    displayName: "⚠️ Warning: targetTaskErrorIntegration parameter is not provided."
    enableIf: "{% if config.errNotifyToggle and parameters.targetTaskErrorIntegration | trim | default('') == '' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Error Integration Name
    attributeName: errIntName
    type: textBox
    default: ''
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.errNotifyToggle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Enable Success Notifications
    attributeName: successNotifyToggle
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    isRequired: false

  - type: label
    attributeName: warningSuccIntName
    displayName: "⚠️ Warning: targetTaskSuccessIntegration parameter is not provided."
    enableIf: "{% if config.successNotifyToggle and parameters.targetTaskSuccessIntegration | trim | default('') == '' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Success Integration Name
    attributeName: succIntName
    type: textBox
    default: ''
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.successNotifyToggle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

- groupName: Hidden Config
  enableIf: "false"
  items:
  - displayName: Type
    type: materializationSelector
    default: task
    options:
    - task
    isRequired: false

capitalized: Dimension

    isRequired: true
    default: table

    - table
    - view

  - type: overrideSQLToggle
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType == 'view' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

    - "UNION"

config:
- groupName: Options
  items:
  - type: materializationSelector
    isRequired: true
    default: table
    options:
    - table
    - view

  - type: overrideSQLToggle
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType == 'view' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
	
  - type: multisourceToggle
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType == 'view' and node.override.create.enabled %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"
	
  - displayName: Multi Source Strategy
    attributeName: insertStrategy
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: UNION ALL
    options:
    - "UNION"
    - "UNION ALL"
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if not(node.materializationType == 'view' and node.override.create.enabled) and node.isMultisource %} true{% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: businessKeyColumns
    isRequired: true

  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: lastModifiedComparison
    displayName: Last Modified Comparison
    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view'%} true {%else%} false {%endif%}"
    

  - type: label
    attributeName: l1
    displayName: Columns can either be a timestamp or incremental id column
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' and config.lastModifiedComparison %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    

  - type: columnDropdownSelector
    attributeName: lastModifiedColumn
    displayName: Last Modified Column
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' and config.lastModifiedComparison %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: label
    attributeName: l2
    displayName: The below toggle is applicable only for timestamp column
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' and config.lastModifiedComparison %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"


  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: treatNullAsCurrentTimestamp
    displayName: Treat NULL as Current Timestamp
    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.lastModifiedComparison %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: type2Dimension
    displayName: Type 2 Dimension
    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.lastModifiedComparison  %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: changeTrackingColumns
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.lastModifiedComparison  or node.materializationType == 'view' %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"
 
  - displayName: Truncate Before
    attributeName: truncateBefore
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType == 'view' %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Enable Tests
    attributeName: testsEnabled
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    
  - displayName: Distinct
    attributeName: selectDistinct
    type: toggleButton
    enableIf: "{% if config.groupByAll or  (node.materializationType == 'view' and node.override.create.enabled) %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"
    default: false
    

  - displayName: Group By All
    attributeName: groupByAll
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.selectDistinct or  (node.materializationType == 'view' and node.override.create.enabled) %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Order By
    attributeName: orderby
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType == 'view' %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"

  - type: tabular
    displayName: 'Sort column'
    attributeName: orderbycolumn
    columns:

      -  type: columnDropdownSelector
         displayName: Column Name
         attributeName: sortColName

      -  type: dropdownSelector
         displayName: Sort Order
         attributeName: sortOrder
         default: desc
         options:
         - desc
         - asc
       
    isRequired: true
    enableIf:  "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' and config.orderby %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    
  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: insertZeroKey
    displayName: Insert Zero Key Record
    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType == 'table' or node.materializationType == 'transient table'%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

- groupName: Zero Key Record Options
  items:
  - displayName: Default Surrogate Key Value
    attributeName: insertZeroKeySurrogateKey
    type: textBox
    default: "0"
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.insertZeroKey == true and node.materializationType != 'view' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Default String Value
    attributeName: insertZeroKeyStr
    type: textBox
    default: "UNKNOWN"
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.insertZeroKey == true and node.materializationType != 'view' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Default Date Value (Date Format DD-MM-YYYY)
    attributeName: insertZeroKeyDate
    type: textBox
    default: "01-01-1900"
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.insertZeroKey == true and node.materializationType != 'view' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Default Timestamp Value (Timestamp Format YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS.FF)
    attributeName: insertZeroKeyTimestamp
    type: textBox
    default: "1900-01-01 00:00:00.000"
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.insertZeroKey == true and node.materializationType != 'view' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    
  - displayName: Default Boolean Value
    attributeName: insertZeroKeyBol
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: "TRUE"
    isRequired: false
    options:
    - "TRUE"
    - "FALSE"
    enableIf: "{% if config.insertZeroKey == true and node.materializationType != 'view' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: insertZeroKeyAdvanced
    displayName: Advanced Zero Key Record Options
    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if (node.materializationType == 'table'  and config.insertZeroKey == true) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: tabular
    displayName: 'Custom Zero Key Values'
    attributeName: customZeroKeyValues
    columns:

    - type: columnDropdownSelector
      displayName: Column
      attributeName: columnNameDefault
      isRequired: false
      enableIf: "{% if config.insertZeroKey == true and config.insertZeroKeyAdvanced  == true and node.materializationType != 'view' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
  
    -  type: textBox
       displayName: Default Value
       attributeName: columnValueDefault
       isRequired: false
       enableIf: "{% if config.insertZeroKey == true and config.insertZeroKeyAdvanced  == true and node.materializationType != 'view' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
  
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.insertZeroKey == true and config.insertZeroKeyAdvanced  == true and node.materializationType != 'view' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
  enableIf: "{% if config.insertZeroKey  and node.materializationType != 'view' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

- groupName: Pre / Post SQL
  items:
  - displayName: Pre-SQL
    attributeName: preSQL
    type: textBox
    syntax: sql
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType == 'view' %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Post-SQL
    attributeName: postSQL
    type: textBox
    syntax: sql
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType == 'view' %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"
  enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType == 'view' %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"

    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if (node.materializationType == 'table'  and config.insertZeroKey == true) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: tabular
    displayName: 'Custom Zero Key Values'
    attributeName: customZeroKeyValues
    columns:

    - type: columnDropdownSelector
      displayName: Column
      attributeName: columnNameDefault
      isRequired: false
      enableIf: "{% if config.insertZeroKey == true and config.insertZeroKeyAdvanced  == true and node.materializationType != 'view' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
  
    -  type: textBox
       displayName: Default Value
       attributeName: columnValueDefault
       isRequired: false
       enableIf: "{% if config.insertZeroKey == true and config.insertZeroKeyAdvanced  == true and node.materializationType != 'view' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
  
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.insertZeroKey == true and config.insertZeroKeyAdvanced  == true and node.materializationType != 'view' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
  enableIf: "{% if config.insertZeroKey  and node.materializationType != 'view' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

- groupName: Pre / Post SQL
  items:
  - displayName: Pre-SQL
    attributeName: preSQL
    type: textBox
    syntax: sql
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType == 'view' %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Post-SQL
    attributeName: postSQL
    type: textBox
    syntax: sql
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType == 'view' %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"

systemColumns:
- displayName: '{{NODE_NAME}}_KEY'
  transform: ''
  dataType: BIGINT
  placement: beginning
  attributeName: isSurrogateKey

- displayName: SYSTEM_VERSION
  transform: ''
  dataType: INT
  placement: end
  attributeName: isSystemVersion

- displayName: SYSTEM_CURRENT_FLAG
  transform: ''
  dataType: VARCHAR(1)
  placement: end
  attributeName: isSystemCurrentFlag

- displayName: SYSTEM_START_DATE
  transform: CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS TIMESTAMP)
  dataType: TIMESTAMP
  placement: end
  attributeName: isSystemStartDate

- displayName: SYSTEM_END_DATE
  transform: CAST('2999-12-31 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP)
  dataType: TIMESTAMP
  placement: end
  attributeName: isSystemEndDate

- displayName: SYSTEM_CREATE_DATE
  transform: CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS TIMESTAMP)
  dataType: TIMESTAMP
  placement: end
  attributeName: isSystemCreateDate

- displayName: SYSTEM_UPDATE_DATE
  transform: CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS TIMESTAMP)
  dataType: TIMESTAMP
  placement: end
  attributeName: isSystemUpdateDate

variants.nodeMetadataSpec:
capitalized: Dimension Advanced Deploy
short: dim
tagColor: '#1E339A'
plural: Dimensions

deployStrategy: advanced

config:
- groupName: Create Options
  items:
  - type: materializationSelector
    isRequired: true
    default: table
    options:
    - table
    - view

  - type: overrideSQLToggle
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType == 'view' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: toggleButton
    displayName: Primary Key
    default: false
    attributeName: primaryToggle
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: tabular   
    displayName: Primary Key Columns* (ℹ️ Not Enforced)
    attributeName: primaryKeyConfig
    columns:

    -  type: columnDropdownSelector
       displayName: Primary Key Columns
       attributeName: primaryKeyColumn
       default: ''

    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' and config.primaryToggle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: partitionByToggle
    displayName: Enable Partitioning
    default: false
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: label
    displayName: ⚠️ Warning - On Redeployment, PARTITION Changes will Drop and Recreate the Table
    attributeName: labelPartWarning
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' and config.partitionByToggle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Partition By*
    attributeName: partitionBy
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: "Ingestion Time"
    options:
    - "Time-Unit Column"
    - "Integer Range"
    - "Ingestion Time"
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' and config.partitionByToggle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: columnDropdownSelector
    displayName: Partition By Column (ℹ️ DataType-DATE)
    attributeName: partByColumn
    isRequired: false
    default: ''
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' and config.partitionByToggle and config.partitionBy == 'Time-Unit Column' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: label
    displayName: 【OR】
    attributeName: labelOR
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' and config.partitionByToggle and config.partitionBy == 'Time-Unit Column' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: textBox
    displayName: "Time-Unit Expression (💡Ex. DATE_TRUNC(columnName, MONTH))"
    attributeName: partByTimeSqlExpression
    default: ""
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' and config.partitionByToggle and config.partitionBy == 'Time-Unit Column' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: textBox
    displayName: "Integer Range Expression* (💡Ex. RANGE_BUCKET(columnName, GENERATE_ARRAY(1, 100, 200)))"
    attributeName: partByIntSqlExpression
    default: ""
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' and config.partitionByToggle and config.partitionBy == 'Integer Range' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: textBox
    displayName: Ingestion-time Expression[Optional] (💡Ex. DATE_TRUNC(_PARTITIONTIME, MONTH))
    attributeName: partByIngnTimeExpression
    default: ''
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' and config.partitionByToggle and config.partitionBy == 'Ingestion Time' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  #----- Not supported For Now ------#
  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: partitionFilterToggle
    displayName: Require Partition Filter
    default: false
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "false"
  # ----------------------------------#

  - type: textBox
    displayName: Partition Expiration Days[Optional] (💡Ex. 30)
    attributeName: partExpireDays
    default: ''
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' and config.partitionByToggle and ( config.partitionBy == 'Time-Unit Column' or config.partitionBy == 'Ingestion Time' ) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: clusterKeyToggle
    displayName: Enable Clustering
    default: false
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: label
    displayName: ⚠️ Warning - On Redeployment, CLUSTER Changes will Drop and Recreate the Table
    attributeName: labelClustWarning
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' and config.clusterKeyToggle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: label
    displayName: ⚠️ Warning - Cluster Columns exceeding the limit of 4
    attributeName: labelCKWarning
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' and config.clusterKeyToggle and config.clusterKeyConfig.get('items') | length > 4 %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: tabular
    displayName: Cluster By* (ℹ️ Only first 4 rows are processed)
    attributeName: clusterKeyConfig
    columns:

    -  type: columnDropdownSelector
       displayName: Cluster By Columns
       default: ''
       attributeName: clustColumn
       isRequired: false
  
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' and config.clusterKeyToggle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: tabExpirationToggle
    displayName: Table Expiration
    default: false
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType == 'view' %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Expiration Type*
    attributeName: exprnType
    default: "DAYS FROM NOW"
    type: dropdownSelector
    options:
    - "EXACT DATE/DATETIME"
    - "DAYS FROM NOW"
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' and config.tabExpirationToggle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: label
    displayName: 'Expiration Value* (💡Ex. 2024-12-31 | 2024-12-31 23:59:59)'
    attributeName: labelTimeExprn
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' and config.tabExpirationToggle and config.exprnType == 'EXACT DATE/DATETIME' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: label
    displayName: 'Expiration Value* (💡Ex. 30)'
    attributeName: labelDayExprn
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' and config.tabExpirationToggle and config.exprnType == 'DAYS FROM NOW' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: textBox
    displayName: ''
    attributeName: tabExprnExpression
    default: ""
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' and config.tabExpirationToggle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Default Rounding Mode[Optional]
    attributeName: defRndMode
    default: ""
    type: dropdownSelector
    options:
    - ""
    - "ROUND_HALF_AWAY_FROM_ZERO"
    - "ROUND_HALF_EVEN"
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' %} true {% else %} flase {% endif %}"
    
- groupName: Load Dimension Options

  items:

  - type: multisourceToggle
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType == 'view' and node.override.create.enabled %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Multi Source Strategy*
    attributeName: insertStrategy
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: UNION ALL
    options:
    - "UNION DISTINCT"
    - "UNION ALL"
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if not(node.materializationType == 'view' and node.override.create.enabled) and node.isMultisource %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Update Strategy
    attributeName: updateStrategy
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: MERGE
    options:
    - "MERGE"
    - "INSERT/UPDATE"
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Unmatched Record Strategy
    attributeName: deleteStrategy
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: "NO DELETE"
    options:
    - "NO DELETE"
    - "SOFT DELETE"
    - "HARD DELETE"
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' and config.updateStrategy == 'MERGE' and node.isMultisource == false %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: businessKeyColumns
    isRequired: true

  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: lastModifiedCompToggle
    displayName: Last Modified Comparison
    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' and config.updateStrategy == 'MERGE' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    
  - type: columnDropdownSelector
    attributeName: lastModifiedColumn
    displayName: Comparison Source Column* (ℹ️ dataType - TIMESTAMP or NUMERIC)
    default: ''
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' and config.lastModifiedCompToggle and config.updateStrategy == 'MERGE' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: treatNullAsCurrentTimestamp
    displayName: Treat NULL as Current Timestamp
    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' 
              and config.lastModifiedCompToggle
              and config.updateStrategy == 'MERGE'
              and ('TIMESTAMP' in config.lastModifiedColumn.dataType | upper) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: type2Dimension
    displayName: Enable SCD Type2
    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' and config.lastModifiedCompToggle and config.updateStrategy == 'MERGE' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: changeTrackingColumns
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' and (config.updateStrategy != 'MERGE' or (config.updateStrategy == 'MERGE' and config.lastModifiedCompToggle == false)) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: label
    displayName: ℹ️ Note - SCD Type2 if selected, Else SCD Type1
    attributeName: labelCT
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' and (config.updateStrategy != 'MERGE' or (config.updateStrategy == 'MERGE' and config.lastModifiedCompToggle == false)) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Exclude Columns from Merge (ℹ️ For SCD Type1)
    attributeName: excludeMergeToggle
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' 
                    and config.lastModifiedCompToggle == false
                    and columns
                        | selectattr('isChangeTracking')
                        | list
                        | length == 0 and config.updateStrategy == 'MERGE' %}
                  true
                {% else %} 
                  false
                {% endif %}"

  - type: tabular
    displayName: 'Exclude Merge List'
    attributeName: excludeMergeConfig
    columns:

      -  type: columnDropdownSelector
         displayName: Exclude Column Name
         attributeName: excludeColumn
         default: ''
       
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.excludeMergeToggle
                    and node.materializationType != 'view'
                    and config.updateStrategy == 'MERGE'
                    and config.lastModifiedCompToggle == false
                    and columns
                        | selectattr('isChangeTracking')
                        | list
                        | length == 0
                       %}
                  true
                {% else %} 
                  false
                {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Truncate Before
    attributeName: truncateBefore
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType == 'view' %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Distinct
    attributeName: selectDistinct
    type: toggleButton
    enableIf: "{% if config.groupByAll or (node.materializationType == 'view' and node.override.create.enabled) %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"
    default: false
    
  - displayName: Group By All
    attributeName: groupByAll
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.selectDistinct or (node.materializationType == 'view' and node.override.create.enabled) %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"

  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: insertZeroKeyToggle
    displayName: Insert Zero Key Record
    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

- groupName: Zero Key Record Options
  items:

  - displayName: Default Surrogate Key Value
    attributeName: insertZeroKeySurrogateKey
    type: textBox
    default: "0"
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Default String Value
    attributeName: insertZeroKeyStr
    type: textBox
    default: "UNKNOWN"
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Default Date Value (DD-MM-YYYY)
    attributeName: insertZeroKeyDate
    type: textBox
    default: "01-01-1900"
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Default Timestamp Value (YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS)
    attributeName: insertZeroKeyTimestamp
    type: textBox
    default: "1900-01-01 00:00:00"
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Default Boolean Value
    attributeName: insertZeroKeyBool
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: "TRUE"
    isRequired: false
    options:
    - "TRUE"
    - "FALSE"

  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: insertZeroKeyAdvancedToggle
    displayName: Advanced Zero Key Record Options
    default: false

  - type: tabular
    displayName: 'Custom Zero Key Values'
    attributeName: customZeroKeyValuesConfig
    columns:

    - type: columnDropdownSelector
      displayName: Column
      default: ''
      attributeName: columnNameDefault
      isRequired: false

    -  type: textBox
       displayName: Default Value
       attributeName: columnValueDefault
       isRequired: false
  
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.insertZeroKeyToggle and config.insertZeroKeyAdvancedToggle and node.materializationType != 'view' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    
  enableIf: "{% if config.insertZeroKeyToggle and node.materializationType != 'view' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

- groupName: Other Options
  items:

  - displayName: Enable Tests
    attributeName: testsEnabled
    type: toggleButton
    default: false

  - displayName: Pre-SQL
    attributeName: preSQL
    type: textBox
    syntax: sql
    default: ""
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType == 'view' %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Post-SQL
    attributeName: postSQL
    type: textBox
    syntax: sql
    default: ""
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType == 'view' %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"

  isRequired: false

systemColumns:
- displayName: '{{NODE_NAME}}_key'
  transform: ''
  dataType: STRING
  placement: beginning
  attributeName: isSurrogateKey

- displayName: system_version
  transform: ''
  dataType: INT64
  placement: end
  attributeName: isSystemVersion

- displayName: system_current_flag
  transform: ''
  dataType: STRING
  placement: end
  attributeName: isSystemCurrentFlag

- displayName: system_start_date
  transform: CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS TIMESTAMP)
  dataType: TIMESTAMP
  placement: end
  attributeName: isSystemStartDate

- displayName: system_end_date
  transform: CAST('2999-12-31 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP)
  dataType: TIMESTAMP
  placement: end
  attributeName: isSystemEndDate

- displayName: system_create_date
  transform: CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS TIMESTAMP)
  dataType: TIMESTAMP
  placement: end
  attributeName: isSystemCreateDate

- displayName: system_update_date
  transform: CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS TIMESTAMP)
  dataType: TIMESTAMP
  placement: end
  attributeName: isSystemUpdateDate

capitalized: Dimension Advanced Deploy

- groupName: General Options
