variants.nodeMetadataSpec:
capitalized: Fact Advanced Deploy
short: fct
tagColor: '#D9A438'
plural: Facts

deployStrategy: advanced

config:
- groupName: Create Options
  items:
  - type: materializationSelector
    isRequired: true
    default: table
    options:
    - table
    - view

  - type: overrideSQLToggle
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType == 'view' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: toggleButton
    displayName: Primary Key
    default: false
    attributeName: primaryToggle
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: tabular   
    displayName: Primary Key Columns* (ℹ️ Not Enforced)
    attributeName: primaryKeyConfig
    columns:

    -  type: columnDropdownSelector
       displayName: Primary Key Columns
       attributeName: primaryKeyColumn
       default: ''

    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' and config.primaryToggle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: partitionByToggle
    displayName: Enable Partitioning
    default: false
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: label
    displayName: ⚠️ Warning - On Redeployment, PARTITION Changes will Drop and Recreate the Table
    attributeName: labelPartWarning
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' and config.partitionByToggle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Partition By*
    attributeName: partitionBy
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: "Ingestion Time"
    options:
    - "Time-Unit Column"
    - "Integer Range"
    - "Ingestion Time"
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' and config.partitionByToggle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: columnDropdownSelector
    displayName: Partition By Column (ℹ️ DataType-DATE)
    attributeName: partByColumn
    isRequired: false
    default: ''
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' and config.partitionByToggle and config.partitionBy == 'Time-Unit Column' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: label
    displayName: 【OR】
    attributeName: labelOR
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' and config.partitionByToggle and config.partitionBy == 'Time-Unit Column' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: textBox
    displayName: "Time-Unit Expression (💡Ex. DATE_TRUNC(columnName, MONTH))"
    attributeName: partByTimeSqlExpression
    default: ""
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' and config.partitionByToggle and config.partitionBy == 'Time-Unit Column' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: textBox
    displayName: "Integer Range Expression* (💡Ex. RANGE_BUCKET(columnName, GENERATE_ARRAY(1, 100, 200)))"
    attributeName: partByIntSqlExpression
    default: ""
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' and config.partitionByToggle and config.partitionBy == 'Integer Range' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: textBox
    displayName: Ingestion-time Expression[Optional] (💡Ex. DATE_TRUNC(_PARTITIONTIME, MONTH))
    attributeName: partByIngnTimeExpression
    default: ''
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' and config.partitionByToggle and config.partitionBy == 'Ingestion Time' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  #----- Not supported For Now ------#
  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: partitionFilterToggle
    displayName: Require Partition Filter
    default: false
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "false"
  # ----------------------------------#

  - type: textBox
    displayName: Partition Expiration Days[Optional] (💡Ex. 30)
    attributeName: partExpireDays
    default: ''
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' and config.partitionByToggle and ( config.partitionBy == 'Time-Unit Column' or config.partitionBy == 'Ingestion Time' ) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: clusterKeyToggle
    displayName: Enable Clustering
    default: false
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: label
    displayName: ⚠️ Warning - On Redeployment, CLUSTER Changes will Drop and Recreate the Table
    attributeName: labelClustWarning
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' and config.clusterKeyToggle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: label
    displayName: ⚠️ Warning - Cluster Columns exceeding the limit of 4
    attributeName: labelCKWarning
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' and config.clusterKeyToggle and config.clusterKeyConfig.get('items') | length > 4 %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: tabular
    displayName: Cluster By* (ℹ️ Only first 4 rows are processed)
    attributeName: clusterKeyConfig
    columns:

    -  type: columnDropdownSelector
       displayName: Cluster By Columns
       default: ''
       attributeName: clustColumn
       isRequired: false
  
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' and config.clusterKeyToggle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: tabExpirationToggle
    displayName: Table Expiration
    default: false
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType == 'view' %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Expiration Type*
    attributeName: exprnType
    default: "DAYS FROM NOW"
    type: dropdownSelector
    options:
    - "EXACT DATE/DATETIME"
    - "DAYS FROM NOW"
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' and config.tabExpirationToggle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: label
    displayName: 'Expiration Value* (💡Ex. 2024-12-31 | 2024-12-31 23:59:59)'
    attributeName: labelTimeExprn
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' and config.tabExpirationToggle and config.exprnType == 'EXACT DATE/DATETIME' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: label
    displayName: 'Expiration Value* (💡Ex. 30)'
    attributeName: labelDayExprn
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' and config.tabExpirationToggle and config.exprnType == 'DAYS FROM NOW' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: textBox
    displayName: ''
    attributeName: tabExprnExpression
    default: ""
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' and config.tabExpirationToggle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Default Rounding Mode[Optional]
    attributeName: defRndMode
    default: ""
    type: dropdownSelector
    options:
    - ""
    - "ROUND_HALF_AWAY_FROM_ZERO"
    - "ROUND_HALF_EVEN"
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' %} true {% else %} flase {% endif %}"
    
- groupName: Load Fact Options

  items:

  - type: multisourceToggle
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType == 'view' and node.override.create.enabled %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Multi Source Strategy*
    attributeName: insertStrategy
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: UNION ALL
    options:
    - "UNION DISTINCT"
    - "UNION ALL"
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if not(node.materializationType == 'view' and node.override.create.enabled) and node.isMultisource %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Unmatched Record Strategy
    attributeName: deleteStrategy
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: "NO DELETE"
    options:
    - "NO DELETE"
    - "HARD DELETE"
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view'
                      and node.isMultisource == false 
                      and (columns 
                        | selectattr('isBusinessKey')
                        | list
                        | length > 0) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: businessKeyColumns
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: lastModifiedCompToggle
    displayName: Last Modified Comparison
    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view'
                  and (columns 
                        | selectattr('isBusinessKey')
                        | list
                        | length > 0) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    
  - type: columnDropdownSelector
    attributeName: lastModifiedColumn
    displayName: Comparison Source Column* (ℹ️ dataType - TIMESTAMP or NUMERIC)
    default: ''
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view'
                and config.lastModifiedCompToggle 
                and (columns 
                        | selectattr('isBusinessKey')
                        | list
                        | length > 0) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: treatNullAsCurrentTimestamp
    displayName: Treat NULL as Current Timestamp
    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' 
              and config.lastModifiedCompToggle
              and ('TIMESTAMP' in config.lastModifiedColumn.dataType | upper)
              and (columns
                  | selectattr('isBusinessKey')
                  | list
                  | length > 0) %}
                  true
                {% else %} 
                  false
                {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Exclude Columns from Merge
    attributeName: excludeMergeToggle
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType != 'view' 
                    and config.lastModifiedCompToggle == false
                    and columns
                        | selectattr('isBusinessKey')
                        | list
                        | length > 0 %}
                  true
                {% else %} 
                  false
                {% endif %}"

  - type: tabular
    displayName: 'Exclude Merge List'
    attributeName: excludeMergeConfig
    columns:

      -  type: columnDropdownSelector
         displayName: Exclude Column Name
         attributeName: excludeColumn
         default: ''
       
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.excludeMergeToggle
                    and node.materializationType != 'view'
                    and config.lastModifiedCompToggle == false
                    and (columns
                        | selectattr('isBusinessKey')
                        | list
                        | length > 0) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Truncate Before
    attributeName: truncateBefore
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType == 'view' %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Distinct
    attributeName: selectDistinct
    type: toggleButton
    enableIf: "{% if config.groupByAll or (node.materializationType == 'view' and node.override.create.enabled) %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"
    default: false
    
  - displayName: Group By All
    attributeName: groupByAll
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.selectDistinct or (node.materializationType == 'view' and node.override.create.enabled) %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"

- groupName: Other Options
  items:

  - displayName: Enable Tests
    attributeName: testsEnabled
    type: toggleButton
    default: false

  - displayName: Pre-SQL
    attributeName: preSQL
    type: textBox
    syntax: sql
    default: ""
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType == 'view' %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Post-SQL
    attributeName: postSQL
    type: textBox
    syntax: sql
    default: ""
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType == 'view' %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"

  isRequired: false

systemColumns:

- displayName: system_create_date
  transform: CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS TIMESTAMP)
  dataType: TIMESTAMP
  placement: end
  attributeName: isSystemCreateDate

- displayName: system_update_date
  transform: CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS TIMESTAMP)
  dataType: TIMESTAMP
  placement: end
  attributeName: isSystemUpdateDate

capitalized: Factless Fact

- groupName: Options
  items:
  - type: materializationSelector
    isRequired: true
    options:
    - table

  - type: overrideSQLToggle
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType == 'view' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: multisourceToggle
    enableIf: "{% if node.override.create.enabled %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Multi Source Strategy
    attributeName: insertStrategy
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: UNION ALL
    options:
    - "UNION"
    - "UNION ALL"
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.isMultisource %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Truncate Before
    attributeName: truncateBefore
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType == 'view' %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Enable Tests
    attributeName: testsEnabled
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    
  - displayName: Distinct
    attributeName: selectDistinct
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.groupByAll or  node.override.create.enabled %} %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Group By All
    attributeName: groupByAll
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.selectDistinct or  node.override.create.enabled %} %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"   

  - displayName: Order By
    attributeName: orderby
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType == 'view' %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"

  - type: tabular
    displayName: 'Sort column'
    attributeName: orderbycolumn
    columns:

      -  type: columnDropdownSelector
         displayName: Column Name
         attributeName: sortColName

      -  type: dropdownSelector
         displayName: Sort Order
         attributeName: sortOrder
         default: desc
         options:
         - desc
         - asc
       
    isRequired: true
    enableIf: "{% if config.orderby %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Pre-SQL
    attributeName: preSQL
    type: textBox
    syntax: sql
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType == 'view' %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Post-SQL
    attributeName: postSQL
    type: textBox
    syntax: sql
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType == 'view' %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"

    enableIf: "{% if config.tabExpirationToggle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

    - "ROUND_HALF_EVEN"
    isRequired: false

- groupName: Load Fact Options

  - displayName: Distinct

    enableIf: "{% if config.groupByAll %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"
    default: false

  - displayName: Group By All
    attributeName: groupByAll
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.selectDistinct %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"   
  
- groupName: Other Options

    attributeName: testsEnabled
    type: toggleButton
    default: false

  - displayName: Pre-SQL
    attributeName: preSQL
    type: textBox
    syntax: sql
    default: ""

  - displayName: Post-SQL
    attributeName: postSQL
    type: textBox
    syntax: sql
    default: ""
    isRequired: false

config:
- groupName: Options
  items:
  - type: materializationSelector
    isRequired: true
    default: table
    options:
    - table
    - transient table

  - type: overrideSQLToggle
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType == 'view' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: multisourceToggle
    enableIf: "{% if node.override.create.enabled %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Multi Source Strategy
    attributeName: insertStrategy
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: UNION ALL
    options:
    - "UNION"
    - "UNION ALL"
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.isMultisource %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: clusterKey
    displayName: Cluster Key
    default: false
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType == 'table' or node.materializationType == 'transient table'  %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: clusterKeyExpressions
    displayName: Allow Expressions in Cluster Key
    default: false
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.clusterKey %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: tabular
    displayName: 'Cluster Key'
    attributeName: clusterKeyConfig
    columns:

    -  type: columnDropdownSelector
       displayName: Column Name
       attributeName: columnName
       isRequired: false
  
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if (config.clusterKey and not config.clusterKeyExpressions) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: tabular
    displayName: 'Cluster Key'
    attributeName: clusterKeyConfigExpressions
    columns:

    -  type: columnDropdownSelector
       displayName: Column Name
       attributeName: columnNameExpressions
       isRequired: false
  
    -  type: textBox
       displayName: Expression(Column name to be enclosed within double quotes)
       attributeName: sqlExpression
       default: "ex. trunc(\"<column_name>\", -5)"
       isRequired: false
  
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if (config.clusterKey and config.clusterKeyExpressions) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"



  - displayName: Truncate Before
    attributeName: truncateBefore
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType == 'view' %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Enable Tests
    attributeName: testsEnabled
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType == 'view' %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"
    
  - displayName: Distinct
    attributeName: selectDistinct
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.groupByAll or  node.override.create.enabled %} %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Group By All
    attributeName: groupByAll
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.selectDistinct or  node.override.create.enabled %} %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"   

  - displayName: Order By
    attributeName: orderby
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType == 'view' %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"

  - type: tabular
    displayName: 'Sort column'
    attributeName: orderbycolumn
    columns:

      -  type: columnDropdownSelector
         displayName: Column Name
         attributeName: sortColName

      -  type: dropdownSelector
         displayName: Sort Order
         attributeName: sortOrder
         default: desc
         options:
         - desc
         - asc
       
    isRequired: true
    enableIf: "{% if config.orderby %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Pre-SQL
    attributeName: preSQL
    type: textBox
    syntax: sql
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType == 'view' %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Post-SQL
    attributeName: postSQL
    type: textBox
    syntax: sql
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType == 'view' %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"

variants.nodeMetadataSpec:
capitalized: Fact with Task
plural: Facts
short: TSKFCT
tagColor: '#D9A438'

deployStrategy: advanced

config:
- groupName: Options
  items:
  - displayName: Development Mode
    attributeName: devMode
    type: toggleButton
    isRequired: true
    default: true

  - type: multisourceToggle

  - displayName: Multi Source Strategy
    attributeName: insertStrategy
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: UNION
    options:
    - "UNION"
    - "UNION ALL"
    isRequired: true
    enableIf: "{% if node.isMultisource %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: businessKeyColumns
    isRequired: false

    # Cluster Key-determines if a node is to be clustered or not #
    
  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: clusterKey
    displayName: Cluster Key
    default: false
    isRequired: false

  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: clusterKeyExpressions
    displayName: Allow Expressions in Cluster Key
    default: false
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.clusterKey %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: tabular
    displayName: 'Cluster Key'
    attributeName: clusterKeyConfig
    columns:

    -  type: columnDropdownSelector
       displayName: Column Name
       attributeName: columnName
       isRequired: false
  
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if (config.clusterKey and not config.clusterKeyExpressions) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: tabular
    displayName: 'Cluster Key'
    attributeName: clusterKeyConfigExpressions
    columns:

    -  type: columnDropdownSelector
       displayName: Column Name
       attributeName: columnNameExpressions
       isRequired: false
  
    -  type: textBox
       displayName: Expression(Column name to be enclosed within double quotes)
       attributeName: sqlExpression
       default: "ex. trunc(\"<column_name>\", -5)"
       isRequired: false
  
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if (config.clusterKey and config.clusterKeyExpressions) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

- groupName: General Options
  items: 
    - type: toggleButton
      attributeName: selectDistinct
      displayName: Distinct
      default: false
      enableIf: "{% if config.groupByAll %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"

    - type: toggleButton
      attributeName: groupByAll
      displayName: Group By All
      enableIf: "{% if config.selectDistinct %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"
      default: false

    - displayName: Order By
      attributeName: orderby
      type: toggleButton
      default: false
      enableIf: "{% if node.materializationType == 'view' %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"

    - type: tabular
      displayName: 'Sort column'
      attributeName: orderbycolumn
      columns:

      -  type: columnDropdownSelector
         displayName: Column Name
         attributeName: sortColName

      -  type: dropdownSelector
         displayName: Sort Order
         attributeName: sortOrder
         default: desc
         options:
         - desc
         - asc
       
      isRequired: true
      enableIf: "{% if config.orderby %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
      
      
- groupName: Scheduling Options

  # Schedule mode-specifies whether a warehouse or serverless compute is used to run the task #
  enableIf: "{% if config.devMode == true %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}" 
  items:

  # Checks whether source streams have data before executing a task #
  - displayName: When Source Stream has Data Flag
    attributeName: flagSrcStream
    type: toggleButton
    default: true
    isRequired: true

  - displayName: Multiple Stream has Data Logic
    attributeName: multiStreamBehavior
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: AND
    options:
      - AND
      - OR
    isRequired: true
    enableIf: "{% if config.flagSrcStream == true %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Scheduling Options
    attributeName: schedulingMode
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: Warehouse Task
    options:
      - Warehouse Task
      - Serverless Task
    isRequired: true

  # Warehouse name  you want the task to run #
  - type: label
    attributeName: note2
    displayName: 
                   "NOTE:
                   \n
                   Ensure the parameter targetTaskWarehouse is added in Workspace and 
                   deployment environment  for successful creation of Steam.  
                   For more information, refer to the documentation."
    enableIf: "{%- if (parameters == {} or parameters.targetTaskWarehouse == '' ) and config.schedulingMode == 'Warehouse Task'-%} true {%- else -%} false {%- endif -%}"

  - displayName: Select Warehouse on which to run task
    attributeName: whName
    type: textBox
    default: '<WAREHOUSE_NAME>'
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulingMode == 'Warehouse Task' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Select initial serverless Warehouse size
    attributeName: serverlessSize
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: '3. MEDIUM'
    options:
      - 1. XSMALL
      - 2. SMALL
      - 3. MEDIUM
      - 4. LARGE
      - 5. XLARGE
      - 6. XXLARGE
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulingMode == 'Serverless Task' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Enable Size Bounds
    attributeName: sizeBoundToggle
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulingMode == 'Serverless Task' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: label
    attributeName: boundErr
    displayName: "⚠️ Min size ≤ Initial size ≤ Max size"
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulingMode == 'Serverless Task'
                  and config.sizeBoundToggle
                  and 
                  (
                    config.minServerlessSize.split('.')[0] | int >= config.serverlessSize.split('.')[0] | int
                    or config.maxServerlessSize.split('.')[0] | int <= config.serverlessSize.split('.')[0] | int
                    or config.maxServerlessSize.split('.')[0] | int <= config.minServerlessSize.split('.')[0] | int
                  )
                %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Minimum Warehouse Size
    attributeName: minServerlessSize
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: '1. XSMALL'
    options:
      - 1. XSMALL
      - 2. SMALL
      - 3. MEDIUM
      - 4. LARGE
      - 5. XLARGE
      - 6. XXLARGE
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulingMode == 'Serverless Task' and config.sizeBoundToggle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Maximum Warehouse Size
    attributeName: maxServerlessSize
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: '6. XXLARGE'
    options:
      - 1. XSMALL
      - 2. SMALL
      - 3. MEDIUM
      - 4. LARGE
      - 5. XLARGE
      - 6. XXLARGE
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulingMode == 'Serverless Task' and config.sizeBoundToggle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  # Way to schedule the task to run #

  - displayName: Task Schedule
    attributeName: schedulePeriodOption
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: Minutes
    options:
      - Minutes
      - CRON
      - Predecessor
    isRequired: true

  - type: tabular
    displayName: Execution Time [💡Seconds(10 - 691200), Minutes(1 - 11520), Hours(1 - 192)]
    attributeName: execTime

    columns:

    -  type: textBox
       displayName: ''
       attributeName: value
       default: 60
       isRequired: false

    -  type: dropdownSelector
       displayName: ''
       attributeName: period
       default: "Minutes"
       options:
        - Seconds
        - Minutes
        - Hours
       isRequired: false

    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption == 'Minutes' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Enter task schedule using CRON
    attributeName: scheduleCRON
    type: textBox
    default: '5 0-23 * * * America/Los_Angeles'
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption == 'CRON' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Enter predecessor task(s) separated by a comma 
    attributeName: predTask
    type: textBox
    default: 'DATA_TRANSFORMATION_ROOT_TASK'
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption == 'Predecessor' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Enter root task name
    attributeName: rootTask
    type: textBox
    default: 'DATA_TRANSFORMATION_ROOT_TASK'
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption == 'Predecessor' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

- groupName: Advanced Scheduling Options
  enableIf: "{% if config.devMode %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"
  items:

  - displayName: Execute As Specific User
    attributeName: spfcUserToggle
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    isRequired: false

  - type: label
    attributeName: userInfo
    displayName: "ℹ️ Runs the task on behalf of a specified user account. Requires GRANT IMPERSONATE ON USER privilege."
    enableIf: "{% if config.spfcUserToggle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: label
    attributeName: warningSpfcUser
    displayName: "⚠️ Warning: targetTaskExecuteAsUser parameter is not provided."
    enableIf: "{% if config.spfcUserToggle and parameters.targetTaskExecuteAsUser | trim | default('') == '' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: User Name
    attributeName: userName
    type: textBox
    default: ''
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.spfcUserToggle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Allow Overlapping Execution
    attributeName: overlapExecToggle
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption not in ['Predecessor'] %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Enable Task Graph Config
    attributeName: taskGraphToggle
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption not in ['Predecessor'] %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Configuration JSON
    attributeName: configJSON
    type: textBox
    default: ''
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption not in ['Predecessor'] and config.taskGraphToggle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Auto-Suspend After Failures
    attributeName: autoSuspendToggle
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption not in ['Predecessor'] %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Number of Consecutive Failures (💡Range. 0 - No Limit)
    attributeName: numFailures
    type: textBox
    default: '10'
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption not in ['Predecessor'] and config.autoSuspendToggle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Enable Auto-Retry
    attributeName: autoRetryToggle
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption not in ['Predecessor'] %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Retry Attempts (💡Range. 0 - 30)
    attributeName: retryAttmpt
    type: textBox
    default: '0'
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption not in ['Predecessor'] and config.autoSuspendToggle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

- groupName: Notification Options
  enableIf: "{% if config.devMode or config.schedulePeriodOption in ['Predecessor'] %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"
  items:

  - displayName: Enable Error Notifications
    attributeName: errNotifyToggle
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    isRequired: false

  - type: label
    attributeName: warningErrIntName
    displayName: "⚠️ Warning: targetTaskErrorIntegration parameter is not provided."
    enableIf: "{% if config.errNotifyToggle and parameters.targetTaskErrorIntegration | trim | default('') == '' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Error Integration Name
    attributeName: errIntName
    type: textBox
    default: ''
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.errNotifyToggle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Enable Success Notifications
    attributeName: successNotifyToggle
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    isRequired: false

  - type: label
    attributeName: warningSuccIntName
    displayName: "⚠️ Warning: targetTaskSuccessIntegration parameter is not provided."
    enableIf: "{% if config.successNotifyToggle and parameters.targetTaskSuccessIntegration | trim | default('') == '' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Success Integration Name
    attributeName: succIntName
    type: textBox
    default: ''
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.successNotifyToggle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

- groupName: Hidden Config
  enableIf: "false"
  items:
  - displayName: Type
    type: materializationSelector
    default: task
    options:
    - task
    isRequired: false

variants.nodeMetadataSpec:
capitalized: Copy of ML FORECAST
short: ML_FCSTS
tagColor: 'blue'
plural: ML Forecasts

config:

- groupName: Forecast Model Input
  items:

    - type: textBox
      displayName: 'Model Instance Name'
      attributeName: 'mname'
      isRequired: true

    - type: toggleButton
      displayName: 'Create Model'
      attributeName: 'Forcecreate'
      default: true

# Toggle to determine if a single-series forecast or a multi-series forecast is to be created #

    - type: toggleButton
      displayName: 'Multi-Series Forecast'
      attributeName: 'multiseries'
      isRequired: false
      default: 'true'

# For multiple time series models, the name of the column defining the multiple time series in input data #

    - type: columnDropdownSelector
      displayName: 'Series Column'
      attributeName: 'seriescol'
      isRequired: false
      enableIf: "{{ config.multiseries }}"

# Name of the column containing the timestamps in input data #

    - type: columnDropdownSelector
      displayName: 'Timestamp Column'
      attributeName: 'tscol'
      isRequired: true

# Name of the column containing the target (dependent value) in input data #

    - type: columnDropdownSelector
      displayName: 'Target Column'
      attributeName: 'tgtcol'
      isRequired: true

# An OBJECT containing key-value pairs used to configure the forecast job #

    - type: toggleButton
      displayName: 'Config Object'
      attributeName: 'cobject'
      isRequired: false
      default: false

    - type: textBox
      displayName: 'Prediction Interval'
      attributeName: 'predictioninterval'
      enableIf: '{%- if config.cobject %}true{%- else %}false{%- endif %}'
      default: 'ex:0.80(float value)'

# The time series to forecast #

    - type: toggleButton
      displayName: 'Series value'
      attributeName: 'series_value'
      isRequired: false
      enableIf: '{%- if config.multiseries  %}true{%- else %}false{%- endif %}' 

    - displayName: Enter the series value
      type: textBox
      attributeName: 'svalue'
      enableIf: '{%- if config.series_value and config.multiseries %}true{%- else %}false{%- endif %}'

# Exogenous variable:additional features influencing the forecast #

    - type: toggleButton
      displayName: 'Exogenous Variables'
      attributeName: 'exvar'
      isRequired: false
      default: 'true'

    - displayName: Future-valued Exogenous data can be added by enabling the multi source toggle below 
      type: label
      enableIf: '{%- if config.exvar %}true{%- else %}false{%- endif %}'

    - displayName: Exogenous data source
      type: multisourceToggle
      enableIf: '{%- if config.exvar %}true{%- else %}false{%- endif %}'

# Required for forecasts without exogenous variables.The number of steps ahead to forecast #

    - displayName: Days To Forecast
      attributeName: fcdays
      type: textBox
      enableIf: '{%- if not config.exvar %}true{%- else %}false{%- endif %}' 
      isRequired: false
      default: '30'

    attributeName: insertStrategy

    options:
    - "UNION DISTINCT"
    - "UNION ALL"

    default: false
    
  - displayName: Distinct

    enableIf: "{%if config.inferschema %} false {%else%} true {%endif%}"

  - displayName: InferSchema
    attributeName: inferschema
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
  
  - displayName: DDL Case Insensitive
    attributeName: ddlCaseInsensitive
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    enableIf: "{%if config.inferschema %} false {%else%} true {%endif%}"

- groupName: Git Repository Configuration
  items: 

  - displayName: GIT Fetch 
    attributeName: fetchBefore
    type: toggleButton
    default: true

  - displayName: Coalesce Storage Location of Snowflake GIT repository 
    attributeName: stageStorageLocationName
    type: textBox
    default: 'Enter Storage Location name'
    isRequired: true

  - displayName: Snowflake GIT Repository Name 
    attributeName: stageName
    type: textBox
    isRequired: true

  - displayName: GIT Branch (Ex:main)
    attributeName: branchName
    type: textBox
    isRequired: true

  - displayName: GIT Folder / Path (Ex:seeds)
    attributeName: subfolder
    type: textBox
    isRequired: false 
  
  - displayName: ⚠️ File Name is mandatory for Infer processing.When loading file ,you can either use pattern or filenames
    type: Label

  - displayName: File Name(s) (Ex:a.csv,b.csv )
    attributeName: fileNames
    type: textBox
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: File Pattern
    attributeName: filePattern
    type: textBox
    default: ".*.*[.]csv"
    enableIf: "{% if config.inferschema == false%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"    

- groupName: File Format Options
  items:
  - displayName: File Format Definition
    attributeName: fileFormatType
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: "File Format Name"
    options:
    - File Format Name
    - File Format Values
    

  - displayName: Coalesce Storage Location of File Format 
    attributeName: fileFormatLoc
    type: textBox
    default: ""
    enableIf: "{% if config.fileFormatType == 'File Format Name'%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"  

  - displayName: File Format Name
    attributeName: fileFormatName
    type: textBox
    default: ""
    enableIf: "{% if config.fileFormatType == 'File Format Name' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
   
  - displayName: Parse header
    attributeName: parsehdr1
    enableIf: "{% if  config.inferschema == true and config.fileType in ('CSV') and config.fileFormatType == 'File Format Name'   %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    type: toggleButton
    default: true
    isRequired: false  

  - displayName: File Type
    attributeName: fileType
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: CSV
    options:
    - "CSV"
    - "PARQUET"
    - "JSON"
    - "AVRO"
    - "ORC"
    - "XML"
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Compression
    attributeName: compression
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType not in ('ORC')) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    type: dropdownSelector
    options:
    - "AUTO"
    - "GZIP"
    - "BZ2"
    - "BROTLI"
    - "ZSTD"
    - "DEFLATE"
    - "RAW_DEFLATE"
    - "NONE"
    - ""
    isRequired: false
    

  - displayName: Record delimiter
    attributeName: recDelim
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV')) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    default: "\n"
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Field delimiter
    attributeName: fieldDelim
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV'))%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    default: ","
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Field optionally enclosed by
    attributeName: fieldEnclosed
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV')) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    default: "\\042"
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Number of header lines to skip
    attributeName: skipHeader
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV') and config.inferschema == false %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    default: "1"
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Parse header
    attributeName: parsehdr
    enableIf: "{% if  config.inferschema == true and config.fileType in ('CSV') and config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name'   %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    type: toggleButton
    default: true
    isRequired: false  
  

  - displayName: Encoding
    attributeName: encoding
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: "UTF8"
    options:
    - "BIG5"
    - "UTF8"
    - "EUCJP"
    - "EUCKR"
    - "GB18030"
    - "IBM420"
    - "IBM424"
    - "IBM949"
    - "ISO2022CN"
    - "ISO2022JP"
    - "ISO2022KR"
    - "ISO88591"
    - "ISO88592"
    - "ISO88595"
    - "ISO88596"
    - "ISO88597"
    - "ISO88598"
    - "ISO88599"
    - "ISO885915"
    - "KOI8R"
    - "SHIFTJIS"
    - "UTF16"
    - "UTF16BE"
    - "UTF16LE"
    - "UTF32"
    - "UTF32BE"
    - "UTF32LE"
    - "WINDOWS874"
    - "WINDOWS949"
    - "WINDOWS1250"
    - "WINDOWS1251"
    - "WINDOWS1252"
    - "WINDOWS1253"
    - "WINDOWS1254"
    - "WINDOWS1255"
    - "WINDOWS1256"
    - ""
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV')) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
  
  - displayName: Strip Outer Array
    attributeName: stripouterarray
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('JSON') )  %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    type: toggleButton
    default: true
    isRequired: false   

  - displayName: Date format
    attributeName: dateformat
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('JSON','CSV') and config.inferschema == false)   %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Time format
    attributeName: timeformat
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('JSON','CSV') ) and config.inferschema == false%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Timestamp format
    attributeName: timestampformat
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('JSON','CSV'))  and config.inferschema == false%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    isRequired: false
  
  - displayName: Trim space
    attributeName: trimSpace
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType not in ('XML'))%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    type: toggleButton
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Replace invalid characters
    attributeName: replaceinvalidcharacters
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name')%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    type: toggleButton
    default: true
    isRequired: false    
  
  - displayName: Using vectorised scanner
    attributeName: usevectscan
    type: toggleButton
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('PARQUET') )   %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    isRequired: false

- groupName: Extended CSV File Format Options
  enableIf: "{% if config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV')%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
  items:

  - displayName: Skip blank lines
    attributeName: skipBlankLines
    enableIf: "{% if config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV') and config.inferschema == false %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    type: toggleButton
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Nulls for empty field
    attributeName: emptyfield
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV'))%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    type: toggleButton
    default: true
    isRequired: false    

  - displayName: Skip byte order mark
    attributeName: bytemark
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV'))%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    type: toggleButton
    default: true
    isRequired: false 
  
  - displayName: Parsing error for column mismatch
    attributeName: columnmismatch
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV'))%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    isRequired: false 
   
  - displayName: Multiple lines
    attributeName: mulline
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV') )  %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    type: toggleButton
    default: true
    isRequired: false   
  
  - displayName: Binary format
    attributeName: binformat
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV')) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: "HEX"
    options:
    - "HEX"
    - "BASE64"
    - "UTF8"
    - ""
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Replace values with NULL
    attributeName: nullchar
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV')and config.inferschema == false) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    default: ('\N')
    isRequired: false   

  - displayName: Escape optionally enclosed by
    attributeName: escapeenclosed
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV')) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    default: "\\134"
    isRequired: false   

  - displayName: Escape enclosed/unenclosed values
    attributeName: escapeval
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV')) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    isRequired: false 

- groupName: Copy Options
  enableIf: "{%if config.inferschema %} false {%else%} true {%endif%}"
  items:

  - displayName: On Error Behavior
    attributeName: onError
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: ""
    options:
    - "CONTINUE"
    - "SKIP_FILE"
    - "SKIP_FILE_<num>"
    - "SKIP_FILE_<num>%"
    - "ABORT_STATEMENT"
    - ""
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Specify the number of errors that can be skipped
    attributeName: errornumber
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if config.onError in('SKIP_FILE_<num>','SKIP_FILE_<num>%') or config.onError1 in('SKIP_FILE_<num>','SKIP_FILE_<num>%') %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Size Limit
    attributeName: sizeLimit
    type: textBox
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Purge Behavior
    attributeName: purgeBehavior
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: ""
    options:
    - "TRUE"
    - "FALSE"
    - ""
    isRequired: false
    
  - displayName: Return Failed Only
    attributeName: returnFailedOnly
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: ""
    options:
    - "TRUE"
    - "FALSE"
    - ""
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Enforce Length
    attributeName: enforceLength
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: ""
    options:
    - "TRUE"
    - "FALSE"
    - ""
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Truncate Columns
    attributeName: truncateColumns
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: ""
    options:
    - "TRUE"
    - "FALSE"
    - ""
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Force
    attributeName: forceLoad
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: ""
    options:
    - "TRUE"
    - "FALSE"
    - ""
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if parameters.loadType != 'Reload'  %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Load Uncertain Files
    attributeName: loadUncertainFiles
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: ""
    options:
    - "TRUE"
    - "FALSE"
    - ""
    isRequired: false  
    


systemColumns:

- displayName: SRC
  transform: '$1'
  dataType: VARIANT
  placement: end
  attributeName: sysJSON

- displayName: LOAD_TIMESTAMP
  transform: 'current_timestamp()::timestamp_ntz'

  attributeName: sysLdTs

- displayName: FILENAME

  dataType: STRING
  placement: end
  attributeName: sysFlNm

- displayName: FILE_ROW_NUMBER
  transform: 'METADATA$FILE_ROW_NUMBER'
  dataType: NUMBER
  placement: end
  attributeName: sysFlRwNm

- displayName: FILE_LAST_MODIFIED
  transform: 'METADATA$FILE_LAST_MODIFIED'
  dataType: TIMESTAMP_NTZ
  placement: end
  attributeName: sysFlLtMd

- displayName: SCAN_TIME
  transform: 'METADATA$START_SCAN_TIME'
  dataType: TIMESTAMP_NTZ
  placement: end
  attributeName: sysFlScTm

capitalized:  Grouped Incremental Load
short: GIL
plural: Grouped Incremental Load

deployStrategy: advanced

config:
- groupName: Options
  items:
  - type: materializationSelector
    default: table
    options:
    - table
    - transient table
    isRequired: true

  - displayName: Storage Mapping ID (E.g EDW_DEV, EDW_PROD etc)
    attributeName: mappingID
    type: textBox
    isRequired: true

  - displayName: Batch Load
    attributeName: batchLoad
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    isRequired: false  

  - displayName: Batch Size
    attributeName: batchSize
    type: textBox
    default: 0
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{{config.batchLoad}}"
    

  - displayName: Persistent table can be a Persistent stage,Dimension or  Fact node
    type: label


  - displayName: Persistent Table location(Storage location in Coalesce)
    attributeName: persistTableLocation
    type: textBox
    isRequired: true


  - displayName: Persistent Table name 
    attributeName: persistTableName
    type: textBox
    isRequired: true

  - displayName: Persistent Table Column Name
    attributeName: persistColumnName
    type: textBox
    isRequired: true

  - displayName: Joining Table Column Name
    attributeName: joinKeyColumnName
    type: textBox
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: "Incremental Load Column (date)"
    attributeName: incColumn
    type: columnDropdownSelector
    isRequired: true

joinTemplate: |
  {%- set src = namespace() -%}
  {%- for dep in sources[0].dependencies -%}
    {%- if loop.index == 1 -%}
    FROM
      {{- ref_raw(dep.node.location.name, dep.node.name) }} "{{ dep.node.name }}"
      {%- set src.name = dep.node.name -%}
    {%- else %}
    INNER JOIN 
    {{- ref_raw(dep.node.location.name, dep.node.name) }} "{{ dep.node.name }}"
    ON {{ dep.node.name }}.{{config.joinKeyColumnName}} = <SITEID> 
    {%- endif -%}

  {%endfor%}
  {%- if config.persistTableName | length > 0 -%}
      {%- set persist = config.persistTableName -%}
  {%- else -%}
      {%- if  config.persistTable | length > 0 %}
        {%- set persist = node.name | replace("INC", config.persistTable) -%}
      {%- else -%}
        {%- set persist = node.name | replace("INC_", config.persistTable) -%}
      {%- endif -%}
   {%- endif %}
      WHERE "{{src.name}}"."{{config.incColumn.name}}" > 
    (SELECT COALESCE(MAX("{{config.incColumn.name}}"), '1900-01-01') 
    FROM {{ref_no_link_raw(config.persistTableLocation, persist)}}
    WHERE {{config.persistColumnName}}  = <SITEID>)

items.enableIf: {{config.batchLoad}}

items.displayName: Persistent table can be a Persistent stage,Dimension or  Fact node

config:
- groupName: Options
  items:

  - type: materializationSelector
    default: view
    options:
    - view
    - table
    isRequired: true

  - displayName: Filter data based on Persistent Table
    attributeName: refTable
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    isRequired: false    
    enableIf: "{% if (config.dqhandle) %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}" 

  - displayName: Handle data quality
    attributeName: dqhandle
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    isRequired: false  
  
  - displayName: Nullability test
    attributeName: dqnull
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    isRequired: false 
    enableIf: "{% if (config.dqhandle) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}" 
  
  - type: tabular
    displayName: 'Data Quality-Nullability test'
    attributeName: ndqcolumns
    columns:

    -  type: columnDropdownSelector
       displayName: Column Name
       attributeName: ncolumnName
       isRequired: false     
      
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if (config.dqhandle and config.dqnull) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Duplicate test
    attributeName: dqdup
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    isRequired: false  
    enableIf: "{% if (config.dqhandle) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}" 

  - type: tabular
    displayName: 'Data Quality-Duplicates test'
    attributeName: ddqcolumns
    columns:

    -  type: columnDropdownSelector
       displayName: Column Name
       attributeName: dcolumnName
       isRequired: false     
      
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if (config.dqhandle and config.dqdup) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Persistent table can be a Persistent stage,Dimension or  Fact node
    type: label
    enableIf: "{% if (config.refTable) and not config.dqhandle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Persistent Table location(Storage location in Coalesce)

    type: textBox
    default: "ex: TARGET"
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if (config.refTable) and not config.dqhandle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Persistent Table name
    attributeName: persistTableName
    type: textBox
    default: "ex: DIM_ORDERS"
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if (config.refTable) and not config.dqhandle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: "Incremental Load Column (date)"
    attributeName: incColumn
    type: columnDropdownSelector
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if (config.refTable) and not config.dqhandle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Pre-SQL
    attributeName: preSQL
    type: textBox
    syntax: sql
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Post-SQL
    attributeName: postSQL
    type: textBox
    syntax: sql
    isRequired: false

joinTemplate: |


  {%- set src = namespace() -%}
  {%- for dep in sources[0].dependencies -%}
    FROM {{ ref_raw(dep.node.location.name, dep.node.name) }} "{{ dep.node.name }}"
    {%- set src.name = dep.node.name -%}
  {%endfor%}
  {%- if config.persistTableName | length > 0 -%}
      {%- set persist = config.persistTableName -%}
  {%- else -%}
      {%- if  config.persistTable | length > 0 %}
        {%- set persist = node.name | replace("INC", config.persistTable) -%}
      {%- else -%}
        {%- set persist = node.name | replace("INC_", config.persistTable) -%}
      {%- endif -%}
  {%- endif -%}
  {%- if config.refTable and persist | length > 0 %}
    WHERE "{{src.name}}"."{{config.incColumn.name}}" > 
    (SELECT COALESCE(MAX("{{config.incColumn.name}}"), '1900-01-01') 
              FROM {{ref_no_link_raw(config.persistTableLocation, persist)}} )
  {%endif%}

config:
- groupName: Source Data
  items:

  - type: materializationSelector
    default: table
    options:
    - table
    - transient table
    isRequired: true 
  
  - displayName: Coalesce Storage Location of Stage
    attributeName: stageStorageLocationName
    type: textBox
    default: 'Enter Storage Location name'
    isRequired: true

  - displayName: Stage Name
    attributeName: stageName
    type: textBox
    default: 'Enter stage name-stage_name/folder/'
    isRequired: true
  
  - displayName: Path or subfolder 
    attributeName: subfolder
    type: textBox
    default: 'Enter folder name in stage if applicable-folder/subfolder'
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: File Name(s) ( Ex:a.csv,b.csv)
    attributeName: fileNames
    type: textBox
    isRequired: true
  
  - displayName: Redeployment Behavior
    attributeName: redeploymentBehavior
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: Create or Replace
    options:
      - Create or Replace
      - Alter existing table
      - Drop existing table
    isRequired: true

- groupName: File Format Options
  items:
  
  - displayName: File Format Definition
    attributeName: fileFormatType
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: "File Format Name"
    options:
    - File Format Name
    - File Format Values
    

  - displayName: Coalesce Storage Location of File Format 
    attributeName: fileFormatLoc
    type: textBox
    default: ""
    enableIf: "{% if config.fileFormatType == 'File Format Name'%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"  

  - displayName: File Format Name
    attributeName: fileFormatName
    type: textBox
    default: ""
    enableIf: "{% if config.fileFormatType == 'File Format Name' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
   
  - displayName: Parse header
    attributeName: parsehdr1
    enableIf: "{% if config.fileType in ('CSV') and config.fileFormatType == 'File Format Name'   %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    type: toggleButton
    default: true
    isRequired: false  

  - displayName: File Type
    attributeName: fileType
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: CSV
    options:
    - "CSV"
    - "PARQUET"
    - "JSON"
    - "AVRO"
    - "ORC"
    - "XML"
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Compression
    attributeName: compression
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType not in ('ORC')) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    type: dropdownSelector
    options:
    - "AUTO"
    - "GZIP"
    - "BZ2"
    - "BROTLI"
    - "ZSTD"
    - "DEFLATE"
    - "RAW_DEFLATE"
    - "NONE"
    - ""
    isRequired: false 

  - displayName: Record delimiter
    attributeName: recDelim
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV')) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    default: "\n"
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Field delimiter
    attributeName: fieldDelim
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV'))%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    default: ","
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Field optionally enclosed by
    attributeName: fieldEnclosed
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV')) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    default: "\\042"
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Parse header
    attributeName: parsehdr
    enableIf: "{% if config.fileType in ('CSV') and config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name'   %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    type: toggleButton
    default: true
    isRequired: false  
  
  - displayName: Encoding
    attributeName: encoding
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: "UTF8"
    options:
    - "BIG5"
    - "UTF8"
    - "EUCJP"
    - "EUCKR"
    - "GB18030"
    - "IBM420"
    - "IBM424"
    - "IBM949"
    - "ISO2022CN"
    - "ISO2022JP"
    - "ISO2022KR"
    - "ISO88591"
    - "ISO88592"
    - "ISO88595"
    - "ISO88596"
    - "ISO88597"
    - "ISO88598"
    - "ISO88599"
    - "ISO885915"
    - "KOI8R"
    - "SHIFTJIS"
    - "UTF16"
    - "UTF16BE"
    - "UTF16LE"
    - "UTF32"
    - "UTF32BE"
    - "UTF32LE"
    - "WINDOWS874"
    - "WINDOWS949"
    - "WINDOWS1250"
    - "WINDOWS1251"
    - "WINDOWS1252"
    - "WINDOWS1253"
    - "WINDOWS1254"
    - "WINDOWS1255"
    - "WINDOWS1256"
    - ""
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV')) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
  
  - displayName: Strip Outer Array
    attributeName: stripouterarray
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('JSON') )  %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    type: toggleButton
    default: true
    isRequired: false   
  
  - displayName: Using vectorised scanner
    attributeName: usevectscan
    type: toggleButton
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('PARQUET') )   %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    isRequired: false

- groupName: Extended CSV File Format Options
  enableIf: "{% if config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV')%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
  items:

  - displayName: Trim space
    attributeName: trimSpace
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType not in ('XML'))%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    type: toggleButton
    isRequired: false

  - displayName: Replace invalid characters
    attributeName: replaceinvalidcharacters
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name')%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    type: toggleButton
    default: true
    isRequired: false    
  
  - displayName: Nulls for empty field
    attributeName: emptyfield
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV'))%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    type: toggleButton
    default: true
    isRequired: false    

  - displayName: Skip byte order mark
    attributeName: bytemark
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV'))%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    type: toggleButton
    default: true
    isRequired: false 
  
  - displayName: Parsing error for column mismatch
    attributeName: columnmismatch
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV'))%} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    isRequired: false 
   
  - displayName: Multiple lines
    attributeName: mulline
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV') )  %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    type: toggleButton
    default: true
    isRequired: false   
  
  - displayName: Binary format
    attributeName: binformat
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV')) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: "HEX"
    options:
    - "HEX"
    - "BASE64"
    - "UTF8"
    - ""
    isRequired: false 

  - displayName: Escape optionally enclosed by
    attributeName: escapeenclosed
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV')) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    default: "\\134"
    isRequired: false   

  - displayName: Escape enclosed/unenclosed values
    attributeName: escapeval
    type: textBox
    enableIf: "{% if (config.fileFormatType != 'File Format Name' and config.fileType in ('CSV')) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    isRequired: false

variants.nodeMetadataSpec:
capitalized: Insert or Merge with Task
short: TIM
plural: Tasks and Merges
tagColor: "#FFA32D"

deployStrategy: advanced

config:

- groupName: General Options
  items:

  - displayName: Development Mode
    attributeName: devMode
    type: toggleButton
    isRequired: true
    default: true

  - type: materializationSelector
    default: table
    options:
    - table
    - transient table
    isRequired: true

    # Cluster Key-determine if a node is to be clustered or not #

  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: clusterKey
    displayName: Cluster Key
    default: false
    isRequired: false

  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: clusterKeyExpressions
    displayName: Allow Expressions in Cluster Key
    default: false
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.clusterKey %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: tabular
    displayName: 'Cluster Key'
    attributeName: clusterKeyConfig
    columns:

    -  type: columnDropdownSelector
       displayName: Column Name
       attributeName: columnName
       isRequired: false
  
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if (config.clusterKey and not config.clusterKeyExpressions) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: tabular
    displayName: 'Cluster Key'
    attributeName: clusterKeyConfigExpressions
    columns:

    -  type: columnDropdownSelector
       displayName: Column Name
       attributeName: columnNameExpressions
       isRequired: false
  
    -  type: textBox
       displayName: Expression(Column name to be enclosed within double quotes)
       attributeName: sqlExpression
       default: "ex. trunc(\"<column_name>\", -5)"
       isRequired: false
  
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if (config.clusterKey and config.clusterKeyExpressions) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

- groupName: Target Loading Options
  items:

  - displayName: Load Type
    attributeName: loadType
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: Insert
    options:
      - Insert
      - Merge
    isRequired: true
 
  - type: tabular
    displayName: 'Table Key(s)'
    attributeName: partitionBy
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.loadType == 'Merge' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    columns:
 
    -  type: columnDropdownSelector
       displayName: Column Name
       attributeName: partColName
       isRequired: false
 
  - type: tabular
    displayName: 'Record Date / Timestamp'
    attributeName: mergeOrderBy
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.loadType == 'Merge' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    columns:
 
    -  type: columnDropdownSelector
       displayName: Column Name
       attributeName: colName
       isRequired: false
   
    -  type: dropdownSelector
       displayName: Sort Order
       attributeName: sortOrd
       default: desc
       options:
       - desc
       - asc
       isRequired: false

  - displayName: Truncate Before
    attributeName: truncateBefore
    type: toggleButton
    default: true
    enableIf: "{% if config.loadType == 'Insert' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: multisourceToggle
  
  - displayName: Multi Source Strategy
    attributeName: insertStrategy
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: UNION
    options:
    - "UNION"
    - "UNION ALL"
    isRequired: true
    enableIf: "{% if node.isMultisource %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: selectDistinct
    displayName: Distinct
    default: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.groupByAll %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"

  - type: toggleButton
    attributeName: groupByAll
    displayName: Group By All
    enableIf: "{% if config.selectDistinct %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"
    default: false
     
  - displayName: Order By
    attributeName: orderby
    type: toggleButton
    default: false

  - type: tabular
    displayName: 'Sort column'
    attributeName: orderbycolumn
    isRequired: true
    enableIf: "{% if config.orderby %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    columns:

      -  type: columnDropdownSelector
         displayName: Column Name
         attributeName: sortColName

      -  type: dropdownSelector
         displayName: Sort Order
         attributeName: sortOrder
         default: desc
         options:
         - desc
         - asc

- groupName: Schedule Options

 # Schedule mode-specifies whether a warehouse or serverless compute is used to run the task #
  enableIf: "{% if config.devMode %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}" 
  items:

  # Checks whether source streams have data before executing a task #
  - displayName: When Source Stream has Data Flag
    attributeName: flagSrcStream
    type: toggleButton
    default: true
    isRequired: true

  - displayName: Multiple Stream has Data Logic
    attributeName: multiStreamBehavior
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: AND
    options:
      - AND
      - OR
    isRequired: true
    enableIf: "{% if config.flagSrcStream %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Scheduling Mode
    attributeName: schedulingMode
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: Warehouse Task
    options:
      - Warehouse Task
      - Serverless Task
    isRequired: true

  # Warehouse name you want the task to run #
  - type: label
    attributeName: note2
    displayName: 
                   "NOTE:
                   \n
                   Ensure the parameter targetTaskWarehouse is added in Workspace and 
                   deployment environment  for successful creation of Steam.  
                   For more information, refer to the documentation."
    enableIf: "{%- if (parameters == {} or parameters.targetTaskWarehouse == '' ) and config.schedulingMode == 'Warehouse Task'-%} true {%- else -%} false {%- endif -%}"

  - displayName: Select Warehouse on which to run task
    attributeName: whName
    type: textBox
    default: '<WAREHOUSE_NAME>'
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulingMode == 'Warehouse Task' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Select initial serverless Warehouse size
    attributeName: serverlessSize
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: '3. MEDIUM'
    options:
      - 1. XSMALL
      - 2. SMALL
      - 3. MEDIUM
      - 4. LARGE
      - 5. XLARGE
      - 6. XXLARGE
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulingMode == 'Serverless Task' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Enable Size Bounds
    attributeName: sizeBoundToggle
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulingMode == 'Serverless Task' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: label
    attributeName: boundErr
    displayName: "⚠️ Min size ≤ Initial size ≤ Max size"
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulingMode == 'Serverless Task'
                  and config.sizeBoundToggle
                  and 
                  (
                    config.minServerlessSize.split('.')[0] | int >= config.serverlessSize.split('.')[0] | int
                    or config.maxServerlessSize.split('.')[0] | int <= config.serverlessSize.split('.')[0] | int
                    or config.maxServerlessSize.split('.')[0] | int <= config.minServerlessSize.split('.')[0] | int
                  )
                %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Minimum Warehouse Size
    attributeName: minServerlessSize
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: '1. XSMALL'
    options:
      - 1. XSMALL
      - 2. SMALL
      - 3. MEDIUM
      - 4. LARGE
      - 5. XLARGE
      - 6. XXLARGE
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulingMode == 'Serverless Task' and config.sizeBoundToggle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Maximum Warehouse Size
    attributeName: maxServerlessSize
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: '6. XXLARGE'
    options:
      - 1. XSMALL
      - 2. SMALL
      - 3. MEDIUM
      - 4. LARGE
      - 5. XLARGE
      - 6. XXLARGE
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulingMode == 'Serverless Task' and config.sizeBoundToggle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  # Way to schedule the task to run #

  - displayName: Task Schedule
    attributeName: schedulePeriodOption
    type: dropdownSelector
    default: Minutes
    options:
      - Minutes
      - CRON
      - Predecessor
    isRequired: true

  - type: tabular
    displayName: Execution Time [💡Seconds(10 - 691200), Minutes(1 - 11520), Hours(1 - 192)]
    attributeName: execTime

    columns:

    -  type: textBox
       displayName: ''
       attributeName: value
       default: 60
       isRequired: false

    -  type: dropdownSelector
       displayName: ''
       attributeName: period
       default: "Minutes"
       options:
        - Seconds
        - Minutes
        - Hours
       isRequired: false

    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption == 'Minutes' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Enter task schedule using CRON
    attributeName: scheduleCRON
    type: textBox
    default: '5 0-23 * * * America/Los_Angeles'
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption == 'CRON' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Enter predecessor task(s) separated by a comma
    attributeName: predTask
    type: textBox
    default: 'DATA_TRANSFORMATION_ROOT_TASK'
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption == 'Predecessor' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Enter root task name
    attributeName: rootTask
    type: textBox
    default: 'DATA_TRANSFORMATION_ROOT_TASK'
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption == 'Predecessor' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

- groupName: Advanced Scheduling Options
  enableIf: "{% if config.devMode %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"
  items:

  - displayName: Execute As Specific User
    attributeName: spfcUserToggle
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    isRequired: false

  - type: label
    attributeName: userInfo
    displayName: "ℹ️ Runs the task on behalf of a specified user account. Requires GRANT IMPERSONATE ON USER privilege."
    enableIf: "{% if config.spfcUserToggle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - type: label
    attributeName: warningSpfcUser
    displayName: "⚠️ Warning: targetTaskExecuteAsUser parameter is not provided."
    enableIf: "{% if config.spfcUserToggle and parameters.targetTaskExecuteAsUser | trim | default('') == '' %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: User Name
    attributeName: userName
    type: textBox
    default: ''
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.spfcUserToggle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Allow Overlapping Execution
    attributeName: overlapExecToggle
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption not in ['Predecessor'] %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Enable Task Graph Config
    attributeName: taskGraphToggle
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption not in ['Predecessor'] %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Configuration JSON
    attributeName: configJSON
    type: textBox
    default: ''
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption not in ['Predecessor'] and config.taskGraphToggle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Auto-Suspend After Failures
    attributeName: autoSuspendToggle
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption not in ['Predecessor'] %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Number of Consecutive Failures (💡Range. 0 - No Limit)
    attributeName: numFailures
    type: textBox
    default: '10'
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption not in ['Predecessor'] and config.autoSuspendToggle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Enable Auto-Retry
    attributeName: autoRetryToggle
    type: toggleButton
    default: false
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption not in ['Predecessor'] %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

  - displayName: Retry Attempts (💡Range. 0 - 30)
    attributeName: retryAttmpt
    type: textBox
    default: '0'
    isRequired: false
    enableIf: "{% if config.schedulePeriodOption not in ['Predecessor'] and config.autoSuspendToggle %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

- groupName: Notification Options
  enableIf: "{% if config.devMode or config.schedulePeriodOption in ['Predecessor'] %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"
  items:

  - displayName: Enable Error Notifications

variants.nodeMetadataSpec:
capitalized: Interactive Table
short: INTTBL
tagColor: teal 
plural: Interactive Tables

deployStrategy: advanced

config:
- groupName: General Options
  items:
    - type: label
      attributeName: note1
      displayName: 
                "NOTE:
                \n
                Cannot be used as source for other tables. No Streams or Dynamic tables can be created on Interactive Tables. Can be only used as a target at the end of a data pipeline."
    - type: materializationSelector
      default: interactive table
      options:
      - interactive table
      isRequired: true
    
    - type: toggleButton
      attributeName: selectDistinct
      displayName: Distinct
      default: false
      enableIf: "{% if config.groupByAll %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"

    - type: toggleButton
      attributeName: groupByAll
      displayName: Group By All
      default: false
      enableIf: "{% if config.selectDistinct %} false {% else %} true {% endif %}"

    - type: multisourceToggle

    - displayName: Multi Source Strategy
      attributeName: insertStrategy
      type: dropdownSelector
      default: UNION ALL
      options:
      - "UNION"
      - "UNION ALL" 
      isRequired: false
      enableIf: "{% if node.isMultisource %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

    - displayName: Enable Tests
      attributeName: testsEnabled
      type: toggleButton
      default: false

    - type: toggleButton
      attributeName: clusterKey
      displayName: Cluster Key
      default: false
      isRequired: true

    - type: toggleButton
      attributeName: clusterKeyExpressions
      displayName: All Expressions in Cluster Key
      default: false
      isRequired: false
      enableIf: "{% if config.clusterKey %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    
    - type: tabular
      displayName: 'Cluster Key'
      attributeName: clusterKeyConfig
      columns:

      - type: columnDropdownSelector
        displayName: Column Name
        attributeName: columnName
        isRequired: false

      isRequired: false
      enableIf: "{% if (config.clusterKey and not config.clusterKeyExpressions)  %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

    - type: tabular

      - type: columnDropdownSelector

        attributeName: columnNameExpressions
        isRequired: false

      - type: textBox
        displayName: Expression (Column name to be enclosed within double quotes)
        attributeName: sqlExpression
        default: "ex. trunc(<column_name>, -5)"

      isRequired: false
      enableIf: "{% if (config.clusterKey and config.clusterKeyExpressions) %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
    
    - type: toggleButton
      displayName: Auto Refresh
      attributeName: autoRefresh
      default: false
      isRequired: false

- groupName: Dynamic Interactive Table Options
  items:

    - type: tabular
      displayName: 'Lag Specification'
      attributeName: lagSpecification
      columns:

      - type: textBox
        displayName: Time Value
        attributeName: lagValue
        default: 60
        isRequired: false
        enableIf: "{% if config.autoRefresh %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"

      - type: dropdownSelector
        displayName: Time Period
        attributeName: lagPeriod
        default: "Minutes"
        options:
        - Seconds
        - Minutes
        - Hours
        - Days
        isRequired: false
        enableIf: "{% if config.autoRefresh %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"
      
      isRequired: false
      enableIf: "{% if config.autoRefresh %} true {% else %} false {% endif %}"  
    - type: label
      attributeName: note2
      displayName: 
                "NOTE:
                \n
                Ensure the parameter targetInteractiveTableWarehouse is added in Workspace and 
                deployment environment  for successful creation of dynamic table.  
                Refer documentation for more info"
      enableIf: "{%- if parameters == {} or parameters.targetInteractiveTableWarehouse == '' -%} true {%- else -%} false {%- endif -%}"

    - type: textBox
      displayName: Warehouse
      attributeName: warehouseName
      default: dev_wh_xs
